new.title: Can Female Representation Reduce Corruption? A Meta-Analysis
new.authors: Juan Du; Xiaojia Zhu; Xufeng Zhu
new.abstract: Female representation in government has long been advocated for promoting good governance, and its potential effect on corruption has attracted sustained scholarly attention. Yet theoretical reasoning and evidence remain fragmented and contested. This preregistered meta-analysis, synthesizing 588 effect sizes from 57 quantitative studies, confirms a statistically significant negative association between female representation and corruption. It further shows that this effect is larger in studies using subjective corruption measures, descriptive representation, only one type of female representation, and excluding country-fixed effects. The results advance our understanding of how and when female representation influences corruption and offer insights for anti-corruption policies.
new.topics: Corruption and Economic Development; Gender Politics and Representation; Microfinance and Financial Inclusion

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Female representation in government has long been advocated for promoting good governance, and its potential effect on corruption has attracted sustained scholarly attention.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 长期以来，女性在政府中的代表性一直被视为促进良好治理的途径，其对腐败的潜在影响也持续吸引着学术界的关注。然而，相关的理论推理和证据仍然零散且存在争议。这项预先注册的元分析综合了57项定量研究中的588个效应量，证实了女性代表性与腐败之间存在统计上显著的负相关关系。研究进一步表明，在使用主观腐败衡量指标、描述性代表性、仅包含一种女性代表性指标以及未纳入国家固定效应的研究中，这种效应更为显著。这些结果增进了我们对女性代表性如何以及何时影响腐败的理解，并为反腐败政策提供了启示。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 57项定量研究中的588个效应量
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 女性代表性与腐败之间存在统计上显著的负相关关系，且该效应在特定研究设计下更为显著。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP。该研究主题（女性代表性与腐败）与用户指定的核心话题（保障房、住房补贴、技能错配等）及代理话题（地方导向政策、城市生产率等）均无直接或间接关联，属于不相关领域。

already_seen.title: Public Services Under Private Management
already_seen.authors: Maíra Coube; Luiz Felipe Fontes; Rudi Rocha
already_seen.abstract: Abstract Theory predicts that outsourcing public services to the private sector can reduce costs and improve efficiency, but can also induce cost-cutting and compromise quality. We assess the Brazilian “Organizações Sociais de Saude” model (OSS), which outsources management of public hospital services to the private sector while the state remains the residual claimant. We show that this enhances hospital production and operational efficiency without adverse effects on hospital quality and equity. Increased inpatient production addresses previously unmet demand, expanding local access to hospital care and reducing population mortality. Performance gains arise from improved operational efficiency achieved through increased hospital management capacity. This facilitates staffing adjustments, favoring higher-skilled personnel, dismissing lower-productivity staff, and adopting flexible, performance-tied employment contracts. Effects are larger among private organizations with more management experience, underscoring returns to managerial capacity. Our findings show that incentive-ownership structures can address the quantity-quality trade-off in public service delivery, even when contracts are incomplete and quality is hard to measure.
already_seen.topics: Healthcare Policy and Management; Facility Location and Emergency Management; Efficiency Analysis Using DEA

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Theory predicts that outsourcing public services to the private sector can reduce costs and improve efficiency, but can also induce cost-cutting and compromise quality.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 理论预测，将公共服务外包给私营部门可以降低成本并提高效率，但也可能引发成本削减并损害质量。我们评估了巴西的“健康社会组织”（OSS）模式，该模式将公立医院服务的管理外包给私营部门，而国家仍保留剩余索取权。我们证明，这提高了医院的生产和运营效率，且未对医院质量和公平性产生不利影响。住院服务产量的增加满足了此前未满足的需求，扩大了当地获得医院护理的机会，并降低了人口死亡率。绩效提升源于通过增强医院管理能力实现的运营效率改进。这促进了人员调整，倾向于雇佣更高技能的人员、解雇低生产率员工，并采用灵活、与绩效挂钩的雇佣合同。在管理经验更丰富的私营组织中，效果更为显著，凸显了管理能力的回报。我们的研究结果表明，即使合同不完善且质量难以衡量，激励-所有权结构也能解决公共服务提供中的数量-质量权衡问题。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_INDIRECT: 间接关联：该研究探讨了公共服务（医院）的私有化管理模式，涉及公共品供给效率和质量权衡，与place-based policy和公共品供给话题相关。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 巴西公立医院数据，具体样本范围未在摘要中明确说明。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 将公立医院管理外包给私营部门可提高生产效率和运营效率，扩大服务可及性并降低死亡率，且不损害质量和公平性。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIM：该研究对公共服务外包的激励设计有启示，但与核心话题（保障房、劳动力流动等）关联较弱。

already_seen.title: The Power of Proximity to Coworkers
already_seen.authors: Natalia Emanuel; Emma Harrington; Amanda Pallais
already_seen.abstract: Abstract How does proximity to coworkers affect training and productivity? We study software engineers at a Fortune 500 firm from 2019 to 2024, leveraging two shocks to proximity: (i) the office closures in 2020 and (ii) the subsequent return-to-office mandates in 2022 and 2023. In both cases, co-located teams experienced bigger changes in proximity than distributed ones, facilitating difference-in-differences designs. We find that sitting near teammates increases coding feedback by 18.3% and improves code quality. Gains are concentrated among less-tenured and younger employees, who are building human capital. However, there is a tradeoff: experienced engineers write less code when sitting near teammates. In national US data, we find evidence that the rise of remote work has had scarring effects on young college graduates. In remotable jobs, young graduates’ unemployment rate increased relative to older graduates’ post-pandemic (2022−2024) compared to pre-pandemic (2017−2019), a pattern we do not observe in non-remotable jobs.
already_seen.topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality; Higher Education and Employability; Ethics and Social Impacts of AI

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: How does proximity to coworkers affect training and productivity?
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 摘要 与同事的邻近性如何影响培训与生产率？我们利用2019年至2024年间一家财富500强企业的软件工程师数据，基于两种邻近性冲击：（i）2020年的办公室关闭以及（ii）随后2022年和2023年的重返办公室强制令。在这两种情形下，与分布式团队相比，同地办公的团队经历了更大的邻近性变化，这有助于采用双重差分设计。我们发现，坐在团队成员附近可使编程反馈增加18.3%，并提高代码质量。这些收益集中在资历较浅和较年轻的员工身上，他们正在积累人力资本。然而，存在一个权衡：经验丰富的工程师在坐在团队成员附近时编写的代码更少。在全美数据中，我们发现证据表明远程工作的兴起对年轻大学毕业生产生了疤痕效应。在可远程办公的工作中，与疫情前（2017-2019年）相比，疫情后（2022-2024年）年轻毕业生的失业率相对于年长毕业生有所上升，而在不可远程办公的工作中未观察到这一模式。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_INDIRECT: 间接关联：该研究探讨了工作场所邻近性对人力资本积累（年轻员工培训与生产率）的影响，这与人力资本外部性话题相关，即员工间的空间邻近可能通过知识溢出促进技能提升。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 一家财富500强企业的软件工程师数据（2019-2024年）及全美数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 与同事邻近性通过增加反馈提升年轻员工人力资本，但会降低经验丰富工程师的产出，且远程工作对年轻毕业生有长期疤痕效应。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIM：该研究聚焦企业内部邻近性对人力资本的影响，与核心话题（如保障房、劳动力流动等）无直接关联，但可为人力资本外部性提供间接参考。

already_seen.title: The Price Effects of Prohibiting Price Parity Clauses: Evidence from Global Hotel Chains
already_seen.authors: Jack (Peiyao) Ma; Andrea Mantovani; Carlo; id_orcid 0000-0002-5069-3592 Reggiani; Annette Broocks; Néstor Duch-Brown
already_seen.abstract: Abstract Dominant platforms like Booking.com have often imposed Price Parity Clauses to prevent lower prices on alternative sales channels. We provide quasi-experimental evidence on the removal of these price restrictions in France in 2015 for three major global hotel groups. Our analysis reveals limited and non-significant price effects for rooms sold through consumer-visible channels, such as hotels’ websites or online travel agencies. However, we document a significant price reduction on sales channels not visible to consumers, such as direct offline bookings. Additionally, we identify a significant shift in the share of bookings from online travel agencies to the hotels’ direct offline channels.
already_seen.topics: Consumer Market Behavior and Pricing; Sharing Economy and Platforms; Digital Marketing and Social Media

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Dominant platforms like Booking.com have often imposed Price Parity Clauses to prevent lower prices on alternative sales channels.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 像Booking.com这样的主导平台经常实施价格平价条款，以防止在替代销售渠道上出现更低的价格。我们利用2015年法国对三大全球酒店集团取消这些价格限制的政策，提供了准实验证据。分析显示，对于消费者可见的销售渠道（如酒店官网或在线旅行社），价格影响有限且不显著。然而，我们发现在消费者不可见的销售渠道（如直接线下预订）上，价格显著下降。此外，我们还发现预订份额从在线旅行社显著转向酒店的直接线下渠道。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 2015年法国三大全球酒店集团的销售数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 取消价格平价条款对消费者可见渠道价格无显著影响，但显著降低了消费者不可见渠道的价格，并导致预订从在线渠道转向线下渠道。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIM - 该研究与保障房、劳动力流动等核心话题无直接或间接关联，但可作为平台经济与价格管制政策评估的参考案例。

already_seen.title: Two-faced on facebook: Ad tailoring in U.S. house campaigns
already_seen.authors: Sarah Waldfogel
already_seen.abstract: Congressional candidates simultaneously seek votes from local residents and money from partisan potential donors who live across the United States. Ad targeting allows political candidates an inexpensive way not only to reach this dispersed partisan audience but also to deliver messages tailored to donors, whose preferences are more extreme than voters’. Using data on geographically-targeted Facebook ads, I find that the national ads of Democratic and Republican candidates have less issue overlap — and are more extreme — than their local, voter-targeted ads. Candidates’ ability to direct tailored, extreme communication to receptive audiences via targeted ads facilitates divergent political speech.
already_seen.topics: Social Media and Politics; Electoral Systems and Political Participation; Media Studies and Communication

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Congressional candidates simultaneously seek votes from local residents and money from partisan potential donors who live across the United States.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 国会候选人同时寻求本地居民的选票和居住在美国各地的党派潜在捐助者的资金。广告定向投放为政治候选人提供了一种低成本的方式，不仅能够触及这些分散的党派受众，还能向捐助者传递量身定制的信息，而捐助者的偏好比选民更为极端。利用地理定向的Facebook广告数据，我发现民主党和共和党候选人的全国性广告与他们的本地、面向选民的广告相比，议题重叠更少，且更为极端。候选人通过定向广告向乐于接受的受众传达量身定制的极端信息的能力，促进了政治言论的分化。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 地理定向的Facebook广告数据，覆盖美国国会竞选活动
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 候选人通过定向广告向全国捐助者传达比本地选民更极端的言论，导致政治议题分化。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 该研究聚焦美国政治竞选中的广告定向与言论极化，与城市经济学、公共财政或劳动力流动等核心话题无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: Praying for Rain
already_seen.authors: José‐Antonio Espín‐Sánchez; Salvador Gil-Guirado; Nicholas Ryan
already_seen.abstract: Abstract We study rainmaking as an instrumental religious belief. We present a model in which a religious leader tries to persuade people to believe. Praying for rain can persuade only where the hazard of rainfall during a dry spell is increasing over time, so that prayer is most likely to succeed when people most want rain. We present evidence from prayers for rain in Murcia, Spain, where the hazard rate is increasing, that the church’s prayers for rain predict rainfall over two centuries. To generalize this finding, we gather an original data set of whether ethnic groups around the world traditionally prayed for rain. We find that ethnic groups facing an increasing rainfall hazard are 47% more likely to pray for rain, consistent with our model’s prediction that societies are more likely to pray for rain where prayer is persuasive.
already_seen.topics: Paranormal Experiences and Beliefs; Evolutionary Game Theory and Cooperation; Religion, Ecology, and Ethics

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: We study rainmaking as an instrumental religious belief.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 我们研究求雨作为一种工具性宗教信仰。我们提出了一个模型，其中宗教领袖试图说服人们相信。只有在干旱期降雨风险随时间增加时，求雨才能具有说服力，这样当人们最需要雨水时，祈祷最有可能成功。我们提供了来自西班牙穆尔西亚求雨仪式的证据，该地降雨风险率是递增的，结果显示教堂的求雨祈祷在两个世纪内预测了降雨。为了推广这一发现，我们收集了一个关于世界各地族群传统上是否求雨的原始数据集。我们发现，面临递增降雨风险的族群求雨的可能性高出47%，这与我们模型的预测一致，即社会更可能在祈祷具有说服力的地方求雨。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 西班牙穆尔西亚两个世纪的降雨数据；全球族群传统求雨行为数据集
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 求雨祈祷在降雨风险递增的地区能预测降雨，且面临递增降雨风险的族群更可能发展出求雨传统。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 该研究聚焦于宗教信仰与降雨的关系，与给定的城市经济学核心话题（保障房、劳动力流动、财政竞争等）无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: Rules of Evidence, Efficiency Claims, and Local Government Amalgamation
already_seen.authors: Diogo Ferreira; Yunji Kim; Masato Miyazaki; Joseph Drew
already_seen.abstract: Scholars have expressed frustration that public policy formulation sometimes proceeds with optimism that lies in stark contrast to the evaluation literature. We present theoretical insights from the rules of evidence that cast greater light on why this might be so. We also conduct novel sophisticated empirical analysis – based on a natural experiment in New South Wales, Australia – to better measure the efficiency outcomes at the heart of most amalgamation proposals. We conclude with our thoughts on the important normative measures, derived from rules of evidence, that might be operationalised to avoid injustice and enhance accountability in the future.
already_seen.topics: Evaluation and Performance Assessment; Public Policy and Administration Research; Policy Transfer and Learning

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Scholars have expressed frustration that public policy formulation sometimes proceeds with optimism that lies in stark contrast to the evaluation literature.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 学者们曾表达过一种挫败感：公共政策的制定有时会基于一种与评估文献形成鲜明对比的乐观态度。我们从证据规则中提出理论见解，以更清晰地揭示为何会出现这种情况。我们还基于澳大利亚新南威尔士州的一项自然实验，进行了新颖且复杂的实证分析，以更好地衡量大多数合并提案所关注的核心效率结果。最后，我们提出了从证据规则中衍生出的重要规范性措施，这些措施可能被付诸实施，以避免不公正并增强未来的问责性。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_INDIRECT: 间接关联：该研究关注地方政府合并（amalgamation）的效率结果，这与地方政府竞争和公共品供给相关，但核心话题是合并政策评估而非直接讨论财政竞争或税收竞争。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 澳大利亚新南威尔士州
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 基于自然实验的实证分析发现，地方政府合并的效率结果与政策制定者的乐观预期存在差距。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIM：该研究聚焦地方政府合并的效率评估，与核心话题（如保障房、劳动力流动等）关联较弱，但方法论（自然实验）和理论视角（证据规则）对政策评估研究有一定参考价值。

already_seen.title: Pluralistic ignorance and climate policies: Information provision experiment
already_seen.authors: Laura Galdikiene; Jūratė Jaraitė; Agne Kajackaite
already_seen.abstract: This study examines how informational interventions that aim to correct systematic misperceptions of others’ beliefs (i.e., pluralistic ignorance) affect individuals’ willingness to engage in both private and publicly observable behaviors. We investigate this question in the context of carbon taxation using an online experiment with participants in the United States. Specifically, we test whether providing accurate information about public support for carbon taxation influences climate-related actions. While this informational intervention reduced misperceptions, it marginally lowered private climate action, measured by donations to an organization advocating for climate policies, although this effect was not statistically significant. The intervention did not affect the behavior of individuals who underestimated support for carbon taxation but negatively impacted the donation decisions of those who overestimated support, suggesting a boomerang effect. In contrast, the intervention increased public climate action, measured by the minimum reward participants required to attend climate policy discussions with peers. These findings suggest that correcting misperceived norms can generate heterogeneous behavioral responses, depending on individuals’ prior beliefs and the type of action considered.
already_seen.topics: Climate Change Communication and Perception; Decision-Making and Behavioral Economics; Environmental Education and Sustainability

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: This study examines how informational interventions that aim to correct systematic misperceptions of others’ beliefs (i.e., pluralistic ignorance) affect individuals’ willingness to engage in both private and publicly observable behaviors.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 本研究探讨旨在纠正他人信念系统性误解（即多元无知）的信息干预如何影响个体参与私人行为和公开可观察行为的意愿。我们通过一项针对美国参与者的在线实验，在碳税背景下研究这一问题。具体而言，我们测试提供关于公众对碳税支持度的准确信息是否会影响气候相关行动。虽然这种信息干预减少了误解，但略微降低了私人气候行动（以向倡导气候政策的组织捐款衡量），尽管这一效应在统计上不显著。该干预并未影响低估碳税支持度的个体的行为，但对高估支持度的个体的捐款决策产生了负面影响，表明存在回旋镖效应。相比之下，该干预增加了公共气候行动，以参与者参加与同龄人进行气候政策讨论所需的最低报酬衡量。这些发现表明，纠正错误认知的规范会根据个体先前的信念和所考虑的行动类型，产生异质性的行为反应。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 美国参与者的在线实验数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 纠正关于他人信念的错误信息会因个体先验信念和行动类型产生异质性行为反应：对私人气候行动有微弱负面影响（高估支持者出现回旋镖效应），但增加了公共气候行动。

already_seen.title: Macroeconomic Effects of Public R&D

already_seen.title: Counterfactual Analysis for Structural Dynamic Discrete Choice Models
already_seen.authors: Myrto Kalouptsidi; Yuichi Kitamura; Lucas Lima; Eduardo Souza-Rodrigues
already_seen.abstract: Abstract Discrete choice data allow researchers to recover differences in utilities, but these differences may not suffice to identify policy-relevant counterfactuals of interest. In fact, in the case of dynamic discrete choice models, only a narrow set of counterfactuals are point-identified. In this paper, we explore how much one can learn about counterfactual outcomes of interest within this framework. We focus on the partial identification of counterfactuals, while allowing for (mild) model restrictions that can gradually shrink the identified set. We derive bounds for low-dimensional objects (such as average welfare) as arguments of optimization programs, along with a uniformly valid inference procedure. Furthermore, we develop new and tractable computational tools and algorithms suitable for dealing with high-dimensional problems like this. Finally, we illustrate in Monte Carlos, as well as an empirical exercise of firms’ export decisions, the informativeness of the identified sets, and we assess the impact of (common) model restrictions on results.

already_seen.title: Open Rule Legislative Bargaining

already_seen.abstract: Abstract The seminal paper by Baron and Ferejohn (1989) leaves significant gaps in our understanding of open rule bargaining. We aim to fill these gaps by providing a fresh analysis of open rule bargaining. Our approach relies on an appealing class of stationary equilibria. In this class, we show that delays tend to be longer and allocations tend to be less egalitarian than originally predicted by Baron and Ferejohn. Our results shed new light on the efficiency and fairness implications of using an open vs. closed rule in legislatures and of bargaining processes in general.

already_seen.title: Data procurement and market power in the Dutch public sector: How to become a stronger buyer
already_seen.authors: Iryna Susha; Sofie de Wilde de Ligny; Fredo Schotanus; Mirko Tobias Schäfer
already_seen.abstract: Governments around the world are actively exploring how they can tackle societal problems through data-driven decision-making. As much data is now in the hands of the private sector, governments increasingly resort to purchasing data from private sources. There is, however, scant empirical evidence and a lack of understanding of the experiences of governments with this practice. This study therefore asks the following questions: how do governments purchase data from the private sector and what challenges do they encounter in the process? We conducted an exploratory multiple case study based on sixteen interviews with seven governments in the Netherlands focusing on use cases in the mobility or spatial domains. Our analysis covers, among other things, the purpose of the purchases and to what extent alternatives and joint procurement were considered, the purchasing procedures and respective market characteristics, and the governments' assessment and satisfaction with the purchases. We identify a number of challenges that are associated with data procurement. Our conclusions highlight three priorities to strengthen the position of governments as buyers of data: the need to balance competing priorities, the need to understand how dependency and lock-in emerges, and the need to expand assessments to public values. • We investigated how seven Dutch governments procure data from companies. • Governments rely on passive data procurement strategies which poses risks. • We identify three priorities for governments to become stronger buyers of data.

_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 世界各国政府正在积极探索如何通过数据驱动决策来解决社会问题。由于大量数据掌握在私营部门手中，政府越来越多地转向从私人来源购买数据。然而，关于政府在这一实践中的经验，目前缺乏实证证据和深入理解。因此，本研究提出以下问题：政府如何从私营部门购买数据，以及在此过程中遇到哪些挑战？我们基于对荷兰七个政府的十六次访谈，开展了一项探索性多案例研究，重点关注交通或空间领域的应用案例。我们的分析涵盖了购买目的、替代方案和联合采购的考虑程度、采购程序及相应的市场特征，以及政府对采购的评估和满意度。我们识别出与数据采购相关的一系列挑战。结论强调了加强政府作为数据购买者地位的三个优先事项：平衡竞争性优先事项的必要性、理解依赖性和锁定效应如何产生的必要性，以及将评估扩展到公共价值的必要性。• 我们调查了七个荷兰政府如何从公司采购数据。• 政府依赖被动的数据采购策略，这带来了风险。• 我们确定了政府成为更强数据购买者的三个优先事项。

already_seen.title: A Qualitative Study of Divergent Workplace Practices Following <scp>S</scp> outh <scp>K</scp> orea's 52‐ <scp>h</scp> Working Time Reform
already_seen.authors: Youngcho Lee
already_seen.abstract: ABSTRACT South Korea is known for its strong work‐centric culture, having long recorded some of the longest working hours in the OECD based on its norm of overtime work. Against this backdrop, the 52‐h working time reform, consisting of 40 standard and 12 overtime hours, was introduced in 2018. The current paper is the first qualitative study to document Korean employees' work experiences following the working time reform based on 32 interviews. The findings show that the reform produced divergent organizational trajectories shaped by firms' capacity and willingness to reorganise work. While a small subset of high‐capacity workplaces normalised a 40‐h working week through active organizational measures, most workplaces experienced more limited change, often with unintended consequences arising from reduced overtime without adequate workload adjustment or the displacement of work into informal and undocumented forms. In yet other cases, the reform had little relevance due to exemption, pre‐existing schedules, or structurally unbounded work. By offering an up‐to‐date picture of how policy interacts with organizational culture and practice, this study contributes to a more nuanced understanding of change and continuity in working time norms following a major policy reform in a hyper work‐oriented context.
already_seen.topics: Work-Family Balance Challenges; Workplace Health and Well-being; Digital Economy and Work Transformation

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: South Korea's 2018 52-hour working time reform produced divergent organizational outcomes shaped by firms' capacity and willingness to reorganize work, with only a minority of high-capacity workplaces normalizing a 40-hour week while most experienced limited change or unintended consequences.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 摘要 韩国以其强烈的工作中心文化而闻名，长期以来，基于加班常态，其工作时间在经合组织国家中一直名列前茅。在此背景下，2018年韩国引入了52小时工作制改革，包括40小时标准工作时间和12小时加班时间。本文是首个基于32次访谈、记录工作制改革后韩国员工工作体验的定性研究。研究结果表明，改革产生了不同的组织轨迹，这取决于企业重组工作的能力和意愿。虽然少数高能力工作场所通过积极的组织措施实现了40小时工作周的正常化，但大多数工作场所的变化较为有限，往往因加班减少而未相应调整工作量，或工作被转移到非正式和未记录的形式，从而产生意想不到的后果。在其他情况下，由于豁免、已有排班或结构性无边界工作，改革几乎不具相关性。通过提供政策如何与组织文化及实践相互作用的最新图景，本研究有助于更细致地理解在高度工作导向的背景下，重大政策改革后工作时间规范的变迁与延续。

_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 韩国52小时工作制改革的效果因企业重组能力而异，仅少数高能力企业实现40小时工作周，多数企业面临有限变化或意外后果。

already_seen.title: Estimation of factors using higher-order multi-cumulants in weak factor models
already_seen.authors: Guanglin Huang; Wanbo Lu; Kris Boudt
already_seen.journal: Journal of Business and Economic Statistics
already_seen.abstract: When factors are weak, covariance-based factor analysis methods tend to exhibit poor performance. To address this issue in the case of non-Gaussian data, we propose a new method called Higher-order multi-cumulant Factor Analysis (HFA). HFA estimates factors and factor loadings via the eigenvalue decomposition of the product of a higher-order multi-cumulant matrix and its transpose. We derive the asymptotic properties of HFA under a weak factor model where non-Gaussianity originates solely from the latent factors, while idiosyncratic errors remain Gaussian. Simulation studies demonstrate that HFA significantly improves both factor selection and estimation when factors are weak and non-Gaussian, compared with traditional methods. Applied to the FRED-MD dataset, HFA identifies factors that improve out-of-sample forecasting performance for the S&P 500 monthly equity premium.

already_seen.authors: Max Boholm; David Karlsson; Johan Berlin
already_seen.abstract: Public organisations are struggling with the urgent need to increase their cybersecurity, i.e. the protection of information and information systems. The aim of this article is to examine how cybersecurity maturity in local government is improved through internal capacity-building and inter-municipal collaboration (IMC), and how the effectiveness of these strategies depends on the timing of their deployment in the development of organisational capacity. Using a two-wave survey of Swedish municipalities (2019 and 2023), we find that internal capacity-building (operationalised as the time allocated to Chief Information Security Officers, CISOs) and IMC through the Swedish Association of Local Authorities and Regions (SALAR) are associated with improvements in cybersecurity maturity, but collaboration with neighbouring municipalities is not. Moreover, the timing of these factors matters. Internal capacity-building through increasing the time allocated to the CISO is key at an early stage, while IMC through SALAR becomes more important as cybersecurity improves. Our work suggests that the level of maturity of cybersecurity capacity moderates the effect of collaboration on further improvement of cybersecurity, as higher cybersecurity capacity raises the ability to identify the problems at hand, which information from external actors is relevant and how this information should best be applied to meet local needs. • Municipalities struggle to strengthen cybersecurity; this study identify the drivers. • Two successful routes: building internal capacity and intermunicipal collaboration. • When security maturity is low, start by growing in-house capacity. • Collaboration through the national association helps; local pacts do not. • Timing matters: capacity first, collaboration later maximizes security gains.

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Public organisations are struggling with the urgent need to increase their cybersecurity, i.e. the protection of information and information systems.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 公共组织正面临提升网络安全的迫切需求，即保护信息和信息系统。本文旨在研究地方政府如何通过内部能力建设和市际合作来提升网络安全成熟度，以及这些策略的有效性如何取决于其在组织能力发展过程中的部署时机。基于对瑞典 municipalities（2019年和2023年）的两轮调查，我们发现：内部能力建设（以首席信息安全官投入时间衡量）以及通过瑞典地方政府和地区协会进行的市际合作与网络安全成熟度的提升相关，但与邻近城市的合作则无此效果。此外，这些因素的时机也很重要。在早期阶段，通过增加首席信息安全官投入时间来加强内部能力建设是关键；而随着网络安全水平的提升，通过瑞典地方政府和地区协会进行的市际合作则变得更加重要。我们的研究表明，网络安全能力的成熟度会调节合作对进一步改善网络安全的效果，因为更高的网络安全能力能提升识别当前问题、判断外部行为者提供的信息是否相关以及如何最好地应用这些信息以满足本地需求的能力。• 各城市在加强网络安全方面面临困难；本研究识别了驱动因素。• 两条成功路径：建设内部能力和市际合作。• 当安全成熟度较低时，应从增强内部能力开始。• 通过全国性协会的合作有效；地方性协议则无效。• 时机很重要：先建设能力，后开展合作，以最大化安全收益。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_METHOD: 描述性统计与回归分析（基于两轮面板调查数据）
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 2019年和2023年对瑞典所有290个 municipalities 的两轮调查数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 地方政府网络安全成熟度的提升依赖于内部能力建设（增加首席信息安全官投入时间）和通过全国性协会的市际合作，且两者存在时序依赖：先内部能力建设，后外部合作。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 该研究聚焦于地方政府网络安全治理，与核心话题（保障房、劳动力流动、财政竞争等）及代理话题（城市生产率、土地市场等）均无关联。

already_seen.title: SDG Reporting by Local Governments: A Systematic Literature Review
already_seen.authors: María Garrido‐Ruso; Manuel Rieiro‐García; Cristina Aibar Guzmán; Beatriz Aibar‐Guzmán
already_seen.abstract: This study conducted a systematic literature review of 15 articles on local government reporting on sustainable development goals (SDG), published in Scopus-indexed journals between 2015 and 2025. The findings reveal that research on this topic is relatively limited, with most papers appearing since 2023. Research is predominantly grounded in institutional and legitimacy theory. Empirical studies focusing on Southern European countries dominate the literature. The studies report low levels of SDG reporting and inconsistent findings relating to its drivers. The analysis highlights the need for scholarship into the integration of SDGs in municipal reporting practices, offering guidance to researchers, regulators, and policymakers to enhance SDG reporting.

already_seen.title: Economic and regulatory drivers of consumer-centric product innovation: A case study of Chinese smartphones in Nigeria
already_seen.authors: Moses Olabhele Esangbedo
already_seen.abstract: This study addresses the problems of market exclusion and the digital divide in Nigeria by examining the smartphone innovation dynamics of Chinese companies, aiming to map consumer-centric adaptation and recommend an integrated framework for sustainable product development in emerging economies. The Disruptive Innovation Theory, Triple Helix Model, and frugal innovation principles were the theoretical frameworks used in the study, which employed a quantitative survey method based on data from 420 Nigerian respondents and 10 in-depth interviews with key industry stakeholders. Market disruption advantage (β = 0.265) and product adaptation strategies (β = 0.287) turned out to be substantial drivers of innovation performance which signified the need for consumer-oriented and localized product designs. The paper proposes an integration of Disruptive Innovation Theory with modern frugal innovation and responsible disruption frameworks, as it addresses both the sustainability imperatives and data sovereignty issues. The study goes beyond previous research by pointing out that localization strategies not only support digital inclusion but also increase the risk of data privacy in the contexts of Anglophone West Africa. The researchers argue that innovation in emerging countries, particularly in Nigeria, can only thrive if local contexts, informal networks, data sovereignty, and regulatory constraints are considered. The results are far-reaching and apply to both the government and the business sectors, highlighting the importance of tiered regulatory frameworks, data localization mandates, and stronger links between formal institutions and grassroots innovation networks. This study, which emphasizes the necessity of two-way knowledge flows and cultural immersion in product development, not only provides context-specific insights for Anglophone West Africa but also contributes to broader discussions of digital colonialism and technology governance. • Sino-Nigerian economic and regulatory dynamics shaping technological innovation in emerging markets. • Innovation-Adaptation Structural Model that explains how firms navigate local constraints to achieve market-specific innovation. • Investigates consumer-centric technological product development strategies by Chinese firms in Nigeria with cultural relevance and affordability. • Mixed-methods approach that integrates qualitative with quantitative analysis for methodological rigor and empirical depth.
already_seen.topics: Innovation and Socioeconomic Development; Open Source Software Innovations; Economic Growth and Development

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: This study addresses the problems of market exclusion and the digital divide in Nigeria by examining the smartphone innovation dynamics of Chinese companies, aiming to map consumer-centric adaptation and recommend an integrated framework for sustainable product development in emerging economies.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 本研究通过考察中国企业在尼日利亚的智能手机创新动态，旨在解决市场排斥和数字鸿沟问题，描绘以消费者为中心的适应性策略，并为新兴经济体的可持续产品开发推荐一个整合框架。研究采用了颠覆性创新理论、三螺旋模型和节俭创新原则作为理论框架，基于420名尼日利亚受访者的定量调查数据和10次关键行业利益相关者的深度访谈。市场颠覆优势（β=0.265）和产品适应策略（β=0.287）被证明是创新绩效的重要驱动因素，这表明了以消费者为导向和本地化产品设计的必要性。本文提出将颠覆性创新理论与现代节俭创新及负责任颠覆框架相结合，以应对可持续性要求和数据主权问题。该研究超越了以往研究，指出本地化策略不仅支持数字包容，也在英语西非背景下增加了数据隐私风险。研究者认为，在新兴国家（尤其是尼日利亚），创新只有在考虑当地语境、非正式网络、数据主权和监管约束时才能蓬勃发展。研究结果对政府和商业部门都具有深远意义，强调了分级监管框架、数据本地化要求以及正式机构与基层创新网络之间更紧密联系的重要性。本研究强调产品开发中双向知识流动和文化沉浸的必要性，不仅为英语西非地区提供了具体情境的见解，也为数字殖民主义和技术治理的更广泛讨论做出了贡献。• 中尼经济与监管动态如何塑造新兴市场的技术创新。• 创新-适应结构模型，解释企业如何应对本地约束以实现市场特定创新。• 调查中国企业在尼日利亚以消费者为中心的技术产品开发策略，兼顾文化相关性和可负担性。• 混合方法，将定性分析与定量分析相结合，以确保方法的严谨性和实证的深度。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_METHOD: 描述性统计与回归分析（定量调查+定性访谈）
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 420名尼日利亚受访者的调查数据及10次行业利益相关者深度访谈
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 市场颠覆优势和产品适应策略是驱动中国智能手机在尼日利亚创新绩效的关键因素。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 该研究聚焦于尼日利亚智能手机市场的产品创新与本地化策略，与核心话题（保障房、劳动力流动、财政竞争等）及代理话题均无关联。

already_seen.title: The overconfident portfolio manager: Bold, brash, and beneficial
already_seen.authors: Jung Hoon Lee; Shyam Venkatesan
already_seen.abstract: Individuals are often overconfident, particularly those in positions that influence economic outcomes. We develop a principal–agent model to study the consequences of hiring an overconfident portfolio manager who overestimates the precision of his private information. In the model, managerial overconfidence increases the manager’s (agent) optimal effort and induces riskier portfolio choices. The investor (principal) can mitigate excessive managerial risk-taking by increasing incentive intensity, which raises the variance of the manager’s compensation and causes the manager to bear more performance risk. When the model imposes additional constraints on the manager’s portfolio choices, we find that the likelihood of portfolio constraints binding increases with managerial overconfidence, which in turn affects effort choice. Overall, when compensation is determined endogenously, we show that moderate managerial overconfidence can increase investor welfare by stimulating effort, whereas excessive overconfidence is detrimental because it leads to excessive risk exposure. The model delivers sharp, testable predictions regarding the interaction among overconfidence, portfolio risk, and compensation design. Using mutual fund data, we provide empirical support for several key implications of the theory, particularly with respect to portfolio constraints and incentive alignment.
already_seen.topics: Financial Markets and Investment Strategies; Corporate Finance and Governance; Experimental Behavioral Economics Studies

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Individuals are often overconfident, particularly those in positions that influence economic outcomes.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 个体常常表现出过度自信，尤其是那些能够影响经济结果的职位上的人。我们构建了一个委托-代理模型，研究雇佣一位高估自身私有信息精度的过度自信投资组合经理的后果。在模型中，管理者的过度自信会提高其（代理人）的最优努力水平，并诱导其选择风险更高的投资组合。投资者（委托人）可以通过提高激励强度来缓解管理者过度的风险承担，但这会增加管理者薪酬的方差，使管理者承担更多的业绩风险。当模型对管理者的投资组合选择施加额外约束时，我们发现投资组合约束被触发的可能性随管理者过度自信程度的提高而增加，这反过来又会影响努力选择。总体而言，当薪酬是内生的时，我们发现适度的管理者过度自信可以通过激励努力来提高投资者福利，而过度的过度自信则因导致过度的风险暴露而有害。该模型就过度自信、投资组合风险与薪酬设计之间的相互作用提出了清晰且可检验的预测。利用共同基金数据，我们为理论的几个关键含义提供了实证支持，特别是关于投资组合约束和激励对齐方面。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_METHOD: 理论模型（委托-代理模型）+ 实证检验
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 共同基金数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 适度的管理者过度自信可通过激励努力提升投资者福利，而过度的过度自信则因增加风险暴露而有害。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 研究主题为金融领域的投资组合经理过度自信，与城市经济学、公共经济学及劳动力市场核心话题无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: Ignorance is Whose Bliss: The Repeal of Compulsory Premarital Health Examinations and Marital Outcomes in Rural China
already_seen.authors: Li Han; Xinzheng Shi; Ming-ang Zhang
already_seen.journal: Journal of the European Economic Association
already_seen.abstract: Abstract Health matters for marital outcomes, but health information may remain concealed until marriage. Our matching model, which incorporates socioeconomic status (SES) and health, predicts that the removal of health information should shift sorting toward SES, potentially reducing child health and welfare, particularly for those with low SES. We empirically examine this in the context of rural China, following the repeal of compulsory premarital health examinations (PHE). Our difference-in-differences estimation, which compares provinces with varying levels of exposure based on pre-policy PHE rates, confirms a larger shift in sorting patterns in provinces with higher treatment intensity. The decrease in health-based assortative matching negatively affects child health outcomes, which is followed by a decline in postmarital subjective well-being. Women and low-SES individuals experience larger losses than their counterparts within the same highly affected provinces, highlighting persistent gender and socioeconomic disparities.
already_seen.topics: Demographic Trends and Gender Preferences; China's Socioeconomic Reforms and Governance; Poverty, Education, and Child Welfare

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Health matters for marital outcomes, but health information may remain concealed until marriage.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 健康对婚姻结果至关重要，但健康信息可能在婚前仍被隐瞒。我们的匹配模型纳入了社会经济地位（SES）和健康因素，预测健康信息的移除应使婚配模式转向基于SES的匹配，这可能降低儿童健康和福利，尤其是对低SES群体而言。我们以中国农村为背景，在强制婚前健康检查（PHE）被废除后进行了实证研究。我们的双重差分估计比较了基于政策实施前PHE率而暴露程度不同的省份，证实了在处理强度更高的省份，婚配模式的转变更为显著。基于健康的同型婚配减少对儿童健康结果产生了负面影响，随后婚后主观幸福感也出现下降。在同一受影响严重的省份内，女性和低SES个体相比其对应群体遭受了更大的损失，凸显了持续的性别和社会经济差距。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 中国农村省份数据，基于政策实施前PHE率划分暴露程度
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 废除强制婚前健康检查导致婚配模式从基于健康转向基于社会经济地位，降低了儿童健康和婚后幸福感，对女性和低SES群体影响更大。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIM，该研究与核心话题（保障房、住房补贴、劳动力流动等）及proxy话题均无直接或间接关联，但方法上使用了DID，对关注婚姻经济学和健康政策的研究者可能有参考价值。

already_seen.title: Life Stabilisation Built on Sand: The Limits of Ontario's Integrated Employment Services
already_seen.authors: Mohammad Ferdosi
already_seen.abstract: ABSTRACT Ontario's Integrated Employment Services reform promises person‐centred assessment and ‘life stabilisation’ supports before people on social assistance are pushed towards work. This article argues that the model is structurally incapable of delivering on that promise because it layers standardised, marketised employment services onto a social assistance regime that keeps people in deep poverty and rations basic supports. Drawing on an anonymous online survey of nearly 1200 Ontario Works and Ontario Disability Support Program recipients who were seeking or considering employment, we use descriptive statistics and thematic analysis to foreground recipients' own accounts of income adequacy, life‐stabilisation supports and Employment Ontario services. Respondents consistently described a system in which housing, food and health costs far exceed benefits; stabilisation supports are difficult to access, crisis‐oriented and time limited; and employment services are thin, generic and poorly aligned with longer‐term goals. At the same time, many reported respectful relationships with individual workers operating within outcome‐based contracting arrangements and scarce resources. We situate these patterns within debates on activation, marketised employment services and social reproduction to show how Integrated Employment Services can mandate activation while failing to create the material and institutional conditions required for sustainable and decent employment.
already_seen.topics: Healthcare innovation and challenges; Social Work Education and Practice; Social Policy and Reform Studies

_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 摘要 安大略省的综合性就业服务改革承诺，在推动社会救助对象走向工作之前，提供以人为中心的评估和"生活稳定化"支持。本文认为，该模式在结构上无法兑现这一承诺，因为它将标准化、市场化的就业服务叠加在一个使人们陷入深度贫困并限制基本支持的社会救助制度之上。基于对近1200名正在寻求或考虑就业的安大略省工作计划和安大略省残障支持计划受助者进行的匿名在线调查，我们使用描述性统计和主题分析，从受助者自身的角度呈现他们对收入充足性、生活稳定化支持和安大略省就业服务的看法。受访者一致描述了一个住房、食品和医疗成本远超福利金的系统；稳定化支持难以获得、以危机为导向且有时限；就业服务薄弱、笼统且与长期目标脱节。同时，许多人报告了与在基于结果的合同安排和稀缺资源下工作的个体工作人员之间相互尊重的关系。我们将这些模式置于关于激活、市场化就业服务和社会再生产的辩论中，以展示综合性就业服务如何在未能创造可持续和体面就业所需的物质和制度条件的情况下，强制推行激活措施。

_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 对近1200名安大略省社会救助受助者的匿名在线调查
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 安大略省的综合性就业服务改革因叠加在深度贫困的社会救助制度上，无法提供承诺的生活稳定化支持，导致就业服务薄弱且与长期目标脱节。

already_seen.title: Doing Ethics Work in Digitalised Welfare: How Discretion and Judgement Are Reconfigured in Everyday Practice
already_seen.authors: Julia S. Carlsson; Teres Hjärpe; Petra M. Svensson
already_seen.abstract: ABSTRACT This article investigates how social workers enact ethical judgement in digitalised welfare organisations. Drawing on the concept of ethics work, it examines how engagements with digital systems involve ongoing processes of identifying, interpreting and responding to ethically salient aspects of practice. The study is based on an organisational ethnography in Swedish social services, combining 45 interviews with social workers and approximately 200 h of shadowing in child and family services and economic assistance units. The analysis focuses on situations where digital systems generate frictions, ambiguities or risks for clients and explores how practitioners discern what is at stake and adjust, supplement or bypass digital routines. The findings show that discretionary responses to digital friction constitute important sites of ethics work. Digitalization introduces new conditions under which ethics work unfolds: ethical concerns are increasingly triggered by system logics embedded in digital systems and practitioners enact responsibility by interpreting system outputs and mitigating unintended consequences for clients. Rather than replacing traditional forms of ethical judgement, digital systems reconfigure when and how ethics work is enacted in everyday welfare practice.
already_seen.topics: Social Work Education and Practice; Focus Groups and Qualitative Methods; Ethics in medical practice

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: This article investigates how social workers enact ethical judgement in digitalised welfare organisations.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 本文探讨社会工作者如何在数字化福利组织中践行伦理判断。研究借鉴"伦理工作"概念，考察与数字系统的互动如何涉及识别、解释和回应实践中伦理相关方面的持续过程。该研究基于瑞典社会服务部门的组织民族志，结合45次社会工作者访谈以及约200小时在儿童与家庭服务及经济援助部门的跟踪观察。分析聚焦于数字系统对客户产生摩擦、模糊性或风险的情境，探究从业者如何辨别利害关系并调整、补充或绕过数字常规。研究结果表明，对数字摩擦的自由裁量回应构成了伦理工作的重要场域。数字化为伦理工作的展开引入了新条件：伦理关切日益由嵌入数字系统的系统逻辑触发，从业者通过解读系统输出并减轻对客户的意外后果来践行责任。数字系统并未取代传统伦理判断形式，而是重新配置了日常福利实践中伦理工作的实施时机与方式。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 瑞典社会服务部门，45次访谈+200小时跟踪观察
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 数字化福利系统中，社会工作者通过自由裁量回应数字摩擦来践行伦理工作，数字系统重新配置而非取代传统伦理判断。

already_seen.title: Liquidity of last resort: The role of X-bond trading in the Chinese government bond market
already_seen.authors: Meryem Duygun; Fuwei Jiang; Zhuoshi Liu; Chaoyan Wang
already_seen.abstract: Traditional negotiation trading dominates the electronic limit order book (LOB) of the X-Bond platform in the Chinese government bond market. Using a unique dataset, we conduct the first systematic study of the X-Bond’s role. We find that: (1) trades via LOB are notably more cost effective than via negotiation, with cost differences influenced by factors such as trader groups, bond types, trade sizes, and on-/off-the-run status; (2) electronic trading reduces the costs of negotiation trades through increased liquidity, an information channel, and a liquidity’s externality; and (3) due to the absence of an interdealer market, the X-Bond platform primarily serves as a liquidity source of last resort for managing inventory risk.

already_seen.title: Combining green finance and digital finance to promote urban energy efficiency through innovation and policy regulation
already_seen.authors: Mujahid Bilal Khan; Songsheng Chen; Ridvan Karacan; Nawal Abdalla Adam
already_seen.abstract: Enhancing urban energy efficiency is critical for China’s sustainable energy transition, yet the combined role of emerging financial mechanisms in driving efficiency improvements remains underexplored. While digital finance and green finance have been studied independently in the energy literature, their potential complementary interaction and the institutional conditions under which it operates have not been empirically examined. This study employs two-way fixed-effects panel estimation, mediation and moderation analyses, and instrumental-variable identification, using data from 279 Chinese prefecture-level cities over 2011–2021. The results reveal that the complementary interaction between digital finance and green finance significantly improves energy efficiency (interaction coefficient = 1.737, p < 0.01), with green technology innovation mediating approximately 58% and digital technology innovation mediating approximately 46% of the total effect. Climate policy uncertainty and market-based environmental regulations positively moderate this complementary effect, while significant heterogeneity emerges across geographic regions, development periods, resource endowments, and pilot policy contexts, with the effect concentrated in Eastern cities and the post-2017 institutional maturation period. These findings demonstrate that integrated financial ecosystem strategies coordinating digital infrastructure development with green finance deployment and supported by market-based environmental regulations are more effective than isolated financial instruments for promoting urban energy efficiency.
already_seen.topics: Energy, Environment, Economic Growth; Sustainable Finance and Green Bonds; Business and Economic Development

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Enhancing urban energy efficiency is critical for China’s sustainable energy transition, yet the combined role of emerging financial mechanisms in driving efficiency improvements remains underexplored.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 提升城市能源效率对中国可持续能源转型至关重要，然而新兴金融机制在推动效率提升方面的协同作用仍未得到充分探索。尽管数字金融和绿色金融已在能源文献中被独立研究，但两者潜在的互补互动效应及其运作的制度条件尚未得到实证检验。本研究采用双向固定效应面板估计、中介与调节效应分析以及工具变量识别方法，使用2011-2021年中国279个地级市的数据。结果显示，数字金融与绿色金融的互补互动显著提升了能源效率（交互项系数=1.737，p<0.01），其中绿色技术创新中介了约58%的总效应，数字技术创新中介了约46%的总效应。气候政策不确定性和市场型环境规制正向调节了这一互补效应，同时在地理区域、发展阶段、资源禀赋和试点政策情境下呈现出显著异质性，该效应集中于东部城市和2017年后的制度成熟期。这些发现表明，将数字基础设施建设与绿色金融部署相协调，并辅以市场型环境规制的综合金融生态系统策略，比孤立的金融工具更能有效促进城市能源效率提升。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_INDIRECT: 间接关联：研究聚焦城市能源效率提升，涉及城市层面的政策效应与制度条件（如环境规制、试点政策），与place-based policy（区域导向政策）和城市生产率议题存在间接关联。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_METHOD: 核心方法：双向固定效应面板估计、中介与调节效应分析、工具变量识别
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 数据来源与样本范围：2011-2021年中国279个地级市数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 核心发现：数字金融与绿色金融的互补互动显著提升城市能源效率，绿色技术创新和数字技术创新是主要中介机制，且该效应受气候政策不确定性和市场型环境规制正向调节。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIM：研究主题（绿色金融与数字金融协同）与核心话题关联度低，但方法规范、发现具体，对关注城市能源效率或金融政策交叉领域的读者可快速浏览。

already_seen.title: Animosity is for the Audience: How Social Context Shapes Expressions of Political Hostility
already_seen.authors: Chloe Ahn; Shengchun Huang; Yphtach Lelkes
already_seen.abstract: Abstract Partisan vitriol has become a defining feature of American politics, evident in survey responses and social media discourse. Conventional wisdom holds that these expressions reflect deeply rooted hostility. Yet they may also function as social signals, reinforcing loyalty and conformity within partisan groups. In this view, animosity is less about entrenched ideological divisions and more about fostering cohesion among co-partisans. We test this proposition in two settings. First, using the 2012 American National Election Studies, which recorded interviewer partisanship, we exploit within-interviewer variation to examine whether respondents adjusted their reported hostility depending on the partisan identity of their interviewer. Respondents expressed significantly more animosity when interviewed by a co-partisan and less when facing an opposing-partisan interviewer. Second, in an online experiment with 1,510 participants, we find that revealing a partner’s partisan alignment—when it matched the participant’s—encouraged more frequent out-group attacks and in-group promotion. These behaviours were strongly shaped by social norms: participants were substantially more likely to attack when their partner had done so in the previous round. Together, these findings suggest that partisan hostility is contingent on immediate social context, not solely on deeply held animus.
already_seen.topics: Social Power and Status Dynamics; Electoral Systems and Political Participation; Social Media and Politics

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Partisan vitriol has become a defining feature of American politics, evident in survey responses and social media discourse.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 党派恶语相向已成为美国政治的一个显著特征，这在调查回复和社交媒体讨论中显而易见。传统观点认为，这些表达反映了根深蒂固的敌意。然而，它们也可能起到社会信号的作用，在党派群体内部强化忠诚和从众。根据这种观点，敌意与其说是关于根深蒂固的意识形态分歧，不如说是为了在党内同志之间培养凝聚力。我们在两个环境中检验了这一命题。首先，利用记录了采访者党派归属的2012年美国全国选举研究数据，我们通过采访者内部的变异来考察受访者是否会根据采访者的党派身份调整其报告的敌意。当受访者面对同党派采访者时，他们表达的敌意显著更多；而面对对立党派采访者时，敌意则较少。其次，在一项有1510名参与者参与的在线实验中，我们发现，当揭示搭档的党派倾向（且与参与者一致）时，会鼓励更频繁的对外群体攻击和对内群体提升。这些行为受到社会规范的强烈塑造：如果搭档在上一轮中进行了攻击，参与者进行攻击的可能性会显著增加。综合来看，这些发现表明，党派敌意取决于即时的社会情境，而不仅仅是根深蒂固的敌意。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_METHOD: 实验+准实验（利用调查中的外生变异）
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 2012年美国全国选举研究（ANES）数据及1510名参与者的在线实验
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 党派敌意的表达高度依赖于即时的社会情境（如同党派采访者或搭档的存在），而非仅仅源于根深蒂固的敌意。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP：该研究与保障房、住房补贴、劳动力流动、财政竞争等核心话题完全无关，属于政治经济学或社会心理学范畴。

already_seen.title: Trafficking as choice? Evidence from Nigeria
already_seen.authors: Tamara Bogatzki; Daniel Meierrieks
already_seen.abstract: The discourse on human trafficking often depicts migrants as deceived victims, while alternative accounts view trafficking as a constrained migration strategy. We contribute to this debate using original survey data from two cross-sectional waves (2021 and 2023) covering more than 2700 respondents in Edo State, Nigeria. A substantial share of respondents reports a willingness to migrate via traffickers despite awareness of the risks of forced labor. A list experiment provides suggestive evidence of underreporting of trafficking approval, particularly among women, likely reflecting stigma surrounding sex work. We examine the determinants of trafficking approval through an aspirations–capabilities framework. Willingness to migrate via traffickers is highest among individuals with strong migration aspirations but limited capabilities. In contrast, exposure to anti-trafficking campaigns has little effect. Respondents are generally well-informed about the potential risks and returns associated with trafficking and do not exhibit cognitive biases such as motivated reasoning. Overall, our findings suggest that trafficking is not primarily driven by ignorance, but instead reflects a constrained choice shaped by limited legal migration options and structural barriers. • 1 in 4 would consider trafficking for migration despite forced labor risks in a representative survey in Edo State, Nigeria. • List experiment reveals gendered underreporting. • High aspirations and low capabilities predict trafficking approval. • Prospective migrants who would resort to trafficking hold reasonable risk and income expectations, with no evidence of motivated reasoning or selective recall. • Awareness campaigns show limited impact; structural reform is needed.
already_seen.topics: Sex work and related issues; Economic Growth and Development; Corruption and Economic Development

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: The discourse on human trafficking often depicts migrants as deceived victims, while alternative accounts view trafficking as a constrained migration strategy.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 关于人口贩运的论述通常将移民描绘成受骗的受害者，而另一些观点则将贩运视为一种受约束的迁移策略。我们利用来自尼日利亚埃多州两轮横截面调查（2021年和2023年）的原始数据（覆盖超过2700名受访者）为这一辩论做出贡献。相当比例的受访者表示，尽管知晓强迫劳动的风险，仍愿意通过贩运者迁移。一项列表实验提供了贩运认可度被低估的提示性证据，尤其是在女性中，这可能反映了围绕性工作的污名化。我们通过“愿望-能力”框架考察了贩运认可度的决定因素。在具有强烈迁移愿望但能力有限的个体中，通过贩运者迁移的意愿最高。相比之下，反贩运宣传的影响甚微。受访者普遍了解与贩运相关的潜在风险和回报，并未表现出动机性推理等认知偏差。总体而言，我们的发现表明，贩运并非主要由无知驱动，而是反映了在有限合法迁移选择和结构性障碍下形成的受约束选择。• 在尼日利亚埃多州的一项代表性调查中，尽管存在强迫劳动风险，仍有四分之一的人会考虑通过贩运迁移。• 列表实验揭示了性别差异下的低报现象。• 高愿望和低能力预测了贩运认可度。• 可能诉诸贩运的潜在移民持有合理的风险和收入预期，没有动机性推理或选择性记忆的证据。• 宣传活动效果有限，需要进行结构性改革。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 2021年和2023年两轮横截面调查，覆盖尼日利亚埃多州超过2700名受访者
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 人口贩运并非由无知驱动，而是反映了在有限合法迁移选择和结构性障碍下形成的受约束选择。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP + 研究主题为尼日利亚人口贩运，与核心话题（保障房/住房补贴/技能错配/空间错配/人力资本外部性/劳动力流动/城市间迁移/财政竞争/税收竞争/地方政府竞争/公共品供给）及间接话题均无关联。

already_seen.authors: Marion Mercier; Arthur Silve; Benjamin Tremblay-Auger

already_seen.abstract: Abstract States sometimes back rebellions abroad to signal resolve. We study this reputation-building logic in international relations, focusing on co-ethnic links between countries as an objective source of variation in a state‚s incentives to demonstrate resolve. We formally derive two interconnected predictions from the mechanism: (a) a state is more likely to endorse the uprising of a foreign group when facing a larger audience, resulting in (b) greater political inclusion for the group. We build a comprehensive panel dataset of co-ethnic rebellion sponsorship, and find evidence consistent with both predictions.

already_seen.journal: Journal of Environmental Economics and Management
already_seen.abstract: Food waste from restaurants contributes to greenhouse gas emissions and puts pressure on urban waste systems, especially in low and middle-income countries. We conducted a randomized controlled trial to assess whether food waste management training reduces kitchen-level organic waste in micro-sized and small restaurants in the hospitality industry in Cusco, Peru, a major global tourist destination. We find that the intervention reduces food waste generation by 10 percent in the trained restaurants. already_seen.title: Urban Administrative Restructuring and Gender Gap in the Labor Market: Evidence From China's City‐County Merger Reform
already_seen.authors: Hui Li; Xiuyan Liu; Jingjing Ye
already_seen.abstract: ABSTRACT As a major form of urban administrative restructuring in China, city‐county mergers dismantle boundaries between municipal districts and surrounding counties, creating more integrated local labor markets. Using longitudinal data from the China Household Finance Survey and a difference‐in‐differences framework, we examine how this restructuring affects gender disparities in labor market outcomes. We find that the reform significantly widens the gender wage gap. Mechanism analysis shows that this gap is driven by several channels, including increased labor competition from migrant inflows, the expansion of manufacturing activity, improvements in transportation infrastructure, and rising housing values. The effects are highly heterogeneous: rural and less‐educated women, as well as women in more developed counties, experience the largest losses relative to men.

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: As a major form of urban administrative restructuring in China, city‐county mergers dismantle boundaries between municipal districts and surrounding counties, creating more integrated local labor markets.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 作为中国城市行政重组的主要形式，撤县（市）设区改革打破了市辖区与周边县之间的行政边界，形成了更加一体化的地方劳动力市场。利用中国家庭金融调查的面板数据以及双重差分框架，我们研究了这一重组如何影响劳动力市场结果的性别差异。我们发现，该改革显著扩大了性别工资差距。机制分析表明，这一差距由多个渠道驱动，包括来自外来人口流入的劳动力竞争加剧、制造业活动的扩张、交通基础设施的改善以及住房价值的上升。其影响具有高度异质性：与男性相比，农村和受教育程度较低的女性，以及较发达县的女性，遭受的相对损失最大。

already_seen.title: Silver economy, population aging, and regional economic resilience
already_seen.authors: Fujuan Zhang; Zixuan Yu
already_seen.abstract: Stimulating the economic momentum of silver hair is a strategic fulcrum to cope with the transformation of population structure and cultivate new momentum of economic growth. Based on the panel data of 31 provinces in China from 2013 to 2024, this paper empirically examines the impact of silver economy on regional economic resilience and its internal mechanism. The study found that: First, the silver-haired economy has a significant effect on regional economic resilience, and this conclusion remains valid under a series of robustness tests. Secondly, the mechanism analysis shows that the silver-haired economy enhances regional economic resilience mainly through three paths: reshaping population structure, optimizing factor allocation and promoting industrial structure upgrading. Third, heterogeneity analysis shows that the effect is more obvious in the south, coastal and central core provinces. The quasi-natural experiment based on the 'pilot reform of home and community care services' further provides causal evidence. This study not only deepens the theoretical understanding of the impact of the silver-haired economy, but also provides important policy implications for improving the ability of regional economic systems to cope with shocks and transformation through the development of the silver-haired economy.

already_seen.title: Scale-dependent capital flows and systemic risk: Multifractal evidence from Mainland China–Hong Kong Stock Connect
already_seen.authors: Can-Zhong Yao; Hao Jiang
already_seen.abstract: This study examines the multifractal and asymmetric dynamics of cross-border capital flows under the Mainland China–Hong Kong Stock Connect system. Using asymmetric MF-DFA and MF-DCCA on daily data from 2016 to 2024, we document nonlinear scaling, directional asymmetry, and scale-dependent patterns in both capital flows and market returns. The results reveal a contrast between price dynamics and capital flows across market conditions: while return series tend to exhibit more compressed multifractal spectra in downward states, capital flows and their cross-market interactions display broader spectra, indicating greater dispersion in scaling behavior. In addition, differences between Northbound and Southbound channels suggest heterogeneous flow–return interactions across regimes and scales. These findings are robust across alternative detrending methods, and are further supported by shuffled and surrogate data diagnostics. Overall, the results highlight the importance of scale-dependent perspectives in understanding the interaction between capital flows and market dynamics in partially integrated financial systems.

already_seen.title: Contagion risks of air pollution control policies on the China energy stock returns
already_seen.authors: Cody Yu-Ling Hsiao; Baiyu Liu; Yi‐Bin Chiu; Chin Man Chui
already_seen.abstract: Given the urgent challenge of extreme climate change and global warming, it is crucial to investigate how air pollution control policies can reduce carbon emissions. This paper analyzes the impact of China’s air pollution control policies (2013-2024) on energy markets. Using the individual and multiple-dependence contagion tests, along with a policy announcement sensitivity index and network analysis, the study quantifies the intensity and direction of risk transmission within energy sectors. The results show that, among the four policy types, market-based environmental regulations exhibit the strongest contagion effects, followed closely by transportation emission controls, while national development plans and energy structure adjustments have the weakest influence. Among the 12 energy segments, photovoltaic power is the most susceptible to policy disruptions, followed by wind and fuel cells, with the coal sector showing the least vulnerability. Network analysis reveals that market-based environmental policies are the most systemically connected, followed by transportation controls, whereas the other two policy types exhibit limited contagion potential.
already_seen.topics: Climate Change Policy and Economics; Market Dynamics and Volatility; Energy, Environment, Economic Growth

_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 鉴于极端气候变化和全球变暖的紧迫挑战，研究空气污染控制政策如何减少碳排放至关重要。本文分析了中国空气污染控制政策（2013-2024年）对能源市场的影响。通过使用个体和多重依赖传染检验，结合政策公告敏感性指数和网络分析，该研究量化了能源部门内部风险传递的强度和方向。结果表明，在四种政策类型中，市场型环境规制表现出最强的传染效应，其次是交通排放控制，而国家发展规划和能源结构调整的影响最弱。在12个能源细分领域中，光伏发电对政策干扰最为敏感，其次是风能和燃料电池，煤炭行业的脆弱性最低。网络分析显示，市场型环境政策具有最强的系统性关联，其次是交通控制，而其他两种政策类型的传染潜力有限。

already_seen.title: The elusive quest for disarmed peace: contest games and international relations
already_seen.authors: Johann Caro-Burnett; Sebastián Galiani; Gustavo Torrens
already_seen.abstract: Abstract This paper develops a dynamic game-theoretic framework to analyze security competition between two states that can invest in a technology to eliminate their rival. Extending the canonical one-shot game, our model incorporates a negotiation (settlement) stage and assumes effective diplomacy, which rules out payoff-dominated equilibria. We fully characterize equilibrium behavior across all discount factors and compare outcomes under high and low elimination costs. The dynamic structure reveals why, even with optimal coordination, long-lasting disarmed peace is rare. By combining the dynamics of military escalation with the constraints of effective diplomacy, the model rationalizes historical cycles of peace, arms races, and conflict. Our approach identifies strategic mechanisms that restrict the sustainability of disarmament and clarifies the conditions under which arms races or conflict become inevitable, offering a deeper understanding of the recurrent nature of international conflict under repeated interaction.
already_seen.topics: Game Theory and Applications; International Relations and Foreign Policy; Defense, Military, and Policy Studies

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: This paper develops a dynamic game-theoretic framework to analyze security competition between two states that can invest in a technology to eliminate their rival.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 本文构建了一个动态博弈理论框架，用于分析两个国家之间在可投资技术以消灭对手情况下的安全竞争。在扩展经典一次性博弈的基础上，我们的模型引入了一个谈判（和解）阶段，并假设有效外交的存在，从而排除了收益占优均衡。我们全面刻画了所有贴现因子下的均衡行为，并比较了高消除成本与低消除成本下的结果。动态结构揭示了为何即使存在最优协调，持久的非武装和平仍然罕见。通过将军事升级的动态与有效外交的约束相结合，该模型解释了和平、军备竞赛与冲突的历史循环。我们的方法识别了限制裁军可持续性的战略机制，并阐明了军备竞赛或冲突在何种条件下变得不可避免，从而为理解重复互动下国际冲突的反复性提供了更深入的洞见。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 无
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 即使存在最优协调和有效外交，持久的非武装和平仍难以实现，军备竞赛或冲突在特定条件下不可避免。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP 该文研究国际关系中的安全竞争与裁军问题，与城市经济学、劳动经济学或公共经济学中的核心话题（如保障房、住房补贴、技能错配、空间错配、人力资本外部性、劳动力流动、城市间迁移、财政竞争、税收竞争、地方政府竞争、公共品供给）及代理话题（如地方导向政策、城市生产率、房地产、基础设施、土地市场、政府债务）均无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: Why Doesn’t the United States Have National Health Insurance? The Political Role of the American Medical Association
already_seen.authors: Marcella Alsan; Yousra Neberai
already_seen.abstract: Abstract This study examines how the American Medical Association (AMA) helped shape the development of the U.S. health insurance system in the critical period after World War II. Working with the political public relations firm Campaigns, Inc., the AMA launched a nationwide campaign to weaken support for National Health Insurance by framing it as “socialized medicine,” while simultaneously enrolling people in private health insurance plans to shift demand away from a public alternative. Drawing on newly assembled archival data, we find that greater exposure to the campaign explains about 20% of the rise in private health insurance enrollment and a comparable decline in public support for a national program. The campaign also appears to have influenced policymaking through coordinated messaging, resolutions passed by civic organizations, congressional rhetoric, and political donations. These findings suggest that the rise of private health insurance in the United States was not solely due to macroeconomic forces or collective bargaining; rather it was also enabled by a strategic, interest group-financed effort to shape citizen views and influence policy.

already_seen.title: An Exact Algorithm for the Vehicle Routing Problem with Time Windows and Perishable Products
already_seen.authors: Selin Hülagü; Claudio Ciancio; Said Dabia; Wout Dullaert
already_seen.abstract: Maintaining the quality of temperature-controlled perishable products during distribution is essential. Several factors affect product quality and the energy cost of refrigeration during distribution, including the temperature inside delivery trucks, route duration, number of stops, and vehicle load. The existing literature on routing for perishable products considers only a limited set of these factors, and most solution methods rely on heuristics or commercial solvers. This research formulates a vehicle routing problem with time windows and quality considerations. The objective is to determine a set of vehicle routes that minimize both travel costs and refrigeration energy costs while satisfying customer quality criteria and time windows. To capture product quality decay during transportation, we propose a function that accounts for the effect of temperature, route duration, number of stops, and vehicle load, thereby extending existing quality decay models in the literature. To solve the problem, we developed a tailored exact framework with several specialized features to efficiently manage quality decay and energy cost functions. Computational experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm is capable of solving instances with up to 100 customers. In addition, we revisit the trade-offs in temperature-controlled routing and provide useful insights into the impact of quality decay and temperature-related coefficients on routing decisions and costs. Funding: This research was partially supported by TKI DINALOG [Grant 2017-2-131TKI]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/trsc.2025.0262 .
already_seen.topics: Vehicle Routing Optimization Methods; Food Supply Chain Traceability; Urban and Freight Transport Logistics

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Maintaining the quality of temperature-controlled perishable products during distribution is essential.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 在配送过程中保持温控易腐产品的质量至关重要。影响配送过程中产品质量和制冷能耗成本的因素包括配送卡车内部温度、路线时长、停靠次数和车辆负载。现有关于易腐产品路径规划的文献仅考虑了其中有限的因素，且大多数求解方法依赖于启发式算法或商业求解器。本研究构建了一个考虑时间窗与质量因素的车辆路径问题。其目标是确定一组车辆路线，在满足客户质量标准和时间窗的同时，最小化旅行成本和制冷能耗成本。为捕捉运输过程中的产品质量衰减，我们提出了一个考虑温度、路线时长、停靠次数和车辆负载影响的函数，从而扩展了现有文献中的质量衰减模型。为解决该问题，我们开发了一个定制化的精确求解框架，该框架具有多项专门特性，可高效管理质量衰减和能耗成本函数。计算实验表明，所提出的算法能够求解包含多达100个客户的实例。此外，我们重新审视了温控路径规划中的权衡关系，并就质量衰减和温度相关系数对路径决策与成本的影响提供了有价值的见解。资助：本研究部分由TKI DINALOG [Grant 2017-2-131TKI]支持。补充材料：在线附录见 https://doi.org/10.1287/trsc.2025.0262。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 计算实验，实例规模达100个客户
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 提出的精确算法能求解最多100个客户的易腐产品带时间窗车辆路径问题，并揭示了质量衰减与温度系数对路径决策的影响。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 该研究专注于运筹学中的车辆路径优化算法，与城市经济学、公共财政或劳动力市场等核心话题无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: The Impact of Autonomous Truck Technology on US Interstate Trade
already_seen.authors: Taejun Mo; Sandy Dall’erba; William Ridley; Yilan Xu; Hyungsun Yim
already_seen.abstract: ABSTRACT Recent advances in autonomous and semi‐autonomous vehicle technologies promise substantial cost savings for goods shipped by truck. In this study, we quantify the impacts of these transport cost reductions on the US interstate trade using a structural gravity model of domestic trade. Based on projected cost savings from the widespread adoption of self‐driving technologies, we estimate significant increases in total interstate trade value. State‐level impacts vary from 40.3% of GDP in Mississippi to 5.9% in Florida, while the largest impacts in dollar value are observed in Texas and New York. The sectoral analysis highlights motorized vehicles, mixed freight, and electronics as the industries experiencing the largest trade value growth. Additionally, goods with low value‐to‐weight ratios—where shipping costs represent a large share of the delivered value—are expected to benefit most in relative terms. These findings underscore the transformative potential of autonomous vehicle technologies in reshaping US trade patterns and sectoral dynamics.
already_seen.topics: Transportation and Mobility Innovations; Urban and Freight Transport Logistics; Traffic control and management

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Recent advances in autonomous and semi‐autonomous vehicle technologies promise substantial cost savings for goods shipped by truck.

already_seen.title: Bidding into bankruptcy: How auction order affects overbidding and losses
already_seen.authors: Mürüvvet Büyükboyacı; Hikmet Gunay; Merve İntişah
already_seen.abstract: Global bidders in sequential auctions face exposure risk when bidding for complementary goods whose values differ in uncertainty. We study how auction order affects this risk in a sequential second-price auction with heterogeneous products, where one good has relatively high valuation variance and the other has low valuation variance. Motivated by simulation-based comparative statics in finite-variance environments, we use laboratory experiments to examine whether auctioning the low-variance good first increases the likelihood of ex-post losses for global bidders. We find that negative payoffs occur significantly more often when the low-variance product is sold first, across both low- and high-synergy environments. Efficiency and revenue are primarily driven by the level of synergy and are not systematically influenced by order. We also document systematic overbidding that depends on auction order and interim outcomes, with bidding behavior differing sharply depending on whether bidders win or lose the first product.
already_seen.topics: Auction Theory and Applications; Supply Chain and Inventory Management; Consumer Market Behavior and Pricing

already_seen.authors: Zhe Liu; Wei Shi; Yan Song; Weizeng Sun
already_seen.abstract: This paper examines households’ extrapolative behaviors and developers’ strategic responses in China’s land and housing markets. Our stylized model predicts that when households extrapolate in the housing market, developers with nearby land holdings strategically bid higher, anticipating rising housing prices to boost the value of their existing stock. Using the exogenous timing of land auctions, we show that higher land premiums increase transaction prices and volumes of nearby houses. Furthermore, developers with nearby land stocks consistently pay higher premiums in the land auctions. We exploit a policy reform and implement various tests to support the hypothesis that developers strategically influence homebuyers’ expectations.

already_seen.title: Online tutoring, school performance, and school-to-work transitions: Evidence from a randomized controlled trial
already_seen.authors: Silke Anger; Bernhard Christoph; Agata Galkiewicz; Shushanik Margaryan; Malte Sandner et al.
already_seen.abstract: Tutoring programs for low-performing students, delivered in-person or online, effectively enhance school performance, yet their medium- and longer-term impacts on labor market outcomes remain less understood. To address this gap, we conduct a randomized controlled trial with 839 secondary school students in Germany to examine the effects of an online tutoring program for low-performing students on academic performance and school-to-work transitions. The online tutoring program had a non-significant intention-to-treat effect of 0.06 standard deviations on math grades six months after program start. However, among students who had not received other tutoring services prior to the intervention, the program significantly improved math grades by 0.14 standard deviations. Moreover, students in non-academic school tracks experienced smoother school-to-work transitions, with vocational training take-up 18 months later being 5 percentage points higher—an effect that was even larger (12 percentage points) among those without prior tutoring. Overall, the results indicate that tutoring can generate lasting benefits for low-performing students that extend beyond school performance.

already_seen.title: The trickster’s legacy: The folklore roots of corruption
already_seen.authors: Jean-Baptiste Marigo; Laurent Weill
already_seen.abstract: • Folklore portraying antisocial behavior as successful is associated with higher corruption. • Folklore emphasizing punishment of antisocial behavior is associated with lower corruption. • Folklore is associated with both demand- and supply-side corruption behaviors of firms. This study examines the role of oral traditions in shaping corruption. Using firm-level data on a large sample of 82,922 firms covering 287 cultural societies in 125 countries, we analyze how the representation of antisocial behavior in folklore is associated with corruption. Our findings reveal that societies with folklore portraying antisocial behaviors as successful tend to exhibit higher levels of corruption, while those with oral traditions emphasizing the negative outcomes of such behaviors experience lower corruption. By distinguishing demand- and supply-side corruption channels, we document that folklore is associated with variations in bribe-related decisions, both for firms that are initiators and targets. Thus, our work contributes to the understanding of deep-rooted cultural determinants of corruption.

already_seen.title: Collective defense by common property: Evidence from the income privatization of kibbutz
already_seen.authors: Liang Diao
already_seen.abstract: Despite the increasing prevalence of armed conflicts, there is limited understanding of how individuals secure their lives under external threats. This paper addresses this gap by examining the impact of armed conflicts on the income privatization of kibbutzim in Israel. Originally equal-sharing settlements, kibbutzim have started paying differential salaries to members. A model is developed, arguing that equal-sharing enhances collective defense in conflict environments, whereas income privatization occurs as external threats diminish. Using rainfall at nearby refugee camps, instrumental variable estimates show that local conflicts explain most of the variation in the timing of income privatization. • Collective communities equal share income to solve the free-rider problem in local defense. • Income privatization occurs as external threats diminish. • Evidence based on the local conflict intensity for 223 Israeli kibbutzim from 1989 to 2014. • Defensive institutions help civilians survive conflicts.

_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 尽管武装冲突日益频繁，但关于个人如何在外部威胁下保障自身安全的研究仍然有限。本文通过考察武装冲突对以色列基布兹（集体社区）收入私有化的影响来填补这一研究空白。基布兹原本是平均分配收入的定居点，但后来开始向成员支付差异化工资。本文构建了一个模型，论证在冲突环境下平均分配有助于增强集体防御，而随着外部威胁减弱，收入私有化便会发生。利用附近难民营降雨量作为工具变量的估计表明，局部冲突解释了基布兹收入私有化时间选择的大部分变异。• 集体社区通过平均分配收入来解决本地防御中的搭便车问题。• 收入私有化在外部威胁减弱时发生。• 证据基于1989年至2014年间223个以色列基布兹的局部冲突强度。• 防御性制度有助于平民在冲突中生存。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 1989-2014年223个以色列基布兹的面板数据，利用附近难民营降雨量作为工具变量
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 外部武装冲突强度显著影响集体社区的收入分配制度选择：冲突加剧时维持平均分配以促进集体防御，冲突减弱时则转向收入私有化。

already_seen.title: Poor Work, Poor Welfare? Occupational Welfare in Cooperative Enterprises: A Case Study From <scp>I</scp> taly
already_seen.authors: Stefano Ronchi; Riccardo Grazioli; F. Maino
already_seen.abstract: ABSTRACT In times of fast‐changing social needs and limited public resources, private welfare provision plays an increasingly prominent role in the welfare mix. This article explores two dimensions of this trend, which have often been examined separately: occupational welfare (OW) and employment in the social economy. We investigate their interplay through a case study of cooperative enterprises in Italy. While cooperatives are central actors in Italy's social economy and play a vital role in delivering welfare services, existing literature points to low wages and precarious working conditions. Does OW improve employment conditions in a sector that, despite its social mission, often reproduces precarious forms of work? To address this question, the article draws on a mixed‐methods approach, combining data from two original surveys with qualitative insights from 25 interviews. The findings reveal that OW appears to be relatively widespread among cooperatives. However, especially in those offering publicly procured welfare services, their provision is severely constrained by tight economic margins. Where present, OW is likely to be used as an indirect supplement to (low) wages rather than for genuine social purposes. Moreover, a clear Matthew effect emerges: higher‐skilled workers in managerial positions benefit the most from OW, which often fails to reach the most vulnerable workers.
already_seen.topics: Cooperative Studies and Economics; Labor Movements and Unions; Social Sciences and Governance

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: In times of fast-changing social needs and limited public resources, private welfare provision plays an increasingly prominent role in the welfare mix.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 在快速变化的社会需求和有限的公共资源背景下，私人福利供给在福利组合中扮演着日益突出的角色。本文探讨了这一趋势的两个维度——职业福利和社会经济中的就业，这两个维度通常被分开研究。我们通过对意大利合作企业的案例研究，考察了它们之间的相互作用。尽管合作社是意大利社会经济的核心参与者，并在提供福利服务方面发挥着重要作用，但现有文献指出其存在低工资和不稳定的工作条件。职业福利是否改善了该部门的就业条件？尽管该部门具有社会使命，但往往复制了不稳定的工作形式。为了解决这个问题，本文采用混合方法，结合两项原始调查的数据和25次访谈的定性见解。研究结果显示，职业福利在合作社中似乎相对普遍。然而，特别是在那些提供公共采购福利服务的合作社中，其提供受到紧张的经济利润空间的严重限制。在存在职业福利的地方，它很可能被用作（低）工资的间接补充，而非出于真正的社会目的。此外，出现了明显的马太效应：管理职位的高技能工人从职业福利中受益最多，而职业福利往往无法惠及最脆弱的工人。

already_seen.title: Can Digital Government Reform Enhance Commercial Credit Financing? Mechanisms and Heterogeneity Analysis
already_seen.authors: Yijing Huang; Zongyu Xu; Xinguo Lu
already_seen.abstract: This paper investigates whether digital government reform can enhance corporate commercial credit financing and explores the underlying mechanisms and heterogeneous effects. Using China's big data management institutional reforms as a quasi-natural experiment and a sample of listed firms from 2007 to 2023, this study employ a difference-in-differences approach to identify the causal impact. The results show that digital government governance (DGOV) significantly promotes corporate commercial credit financing. Heterogeneity analysis indicates that the promotional effect is more pronounced for firms in regions with higher marketization levels and those in less competitive industries. Mechanism tests reveal that DGOV facilitates commercial credit financing primarily by fostering corporate digital transformation, improving information transparency, and strengthening financial institution support. These findings provide robust micro-evidence on the real effects of digital government reform on corporate financing behavior and offer valuable insights for optimizing digital governance and enhancing the corporate financing ecosystem.

already_seen.title: Greenwashing and bank credit risk: Fresh evidence on the role of board diversity across euro area banks
already_seen.authors: Naif Alsagr; Nicholas Apergis
already_seen.abstract: The literature documents that greenwashing enhances the likelihood of failure of banks to disclose sustainable profiles for their products with clarity. In that sense, they seem like deceiving their clientele basis and deteriorate the entire financial system. Given the sustainability legislation in the European Union, the goal of this study is to assess the influence of greenwashing on bank risk by explicitly highlighting the intermediate role of diversity characteristics of their board of directors. The analysis uses panel econometric methods, such as panel unit roots and GMM regressions, while it employs European-listed banks, spanning the period 2010-2020. The results illustrate that greenwashing negatively impacts bank risk, with female directors, PhD holders, and Chairs/CEOs moderating this relation. The findings survive certain robustness checks, such as the application of a different measure for bank risk, alternative measures of gender diversity, inclusion of ESG information, bank size differences, and country geographical differentiation. The work adds to the strand of literature which considers the role of greenwashing in financial entities’ performance in terms of both profitability and risk. The work also offers important implications for banks, for policymakers, and regulators.
