already_seen.title: Asymmetric and regime-dependent connectedness between climate policy uncertainty and Islamic sectoral equities in GCC markets: Implication on portfolio hedging
already_seen.authors: Kingsley I. OKERE; Stephen Kelechi Dimnwobi; Mamdouh Abdulaziz SALEH AL-FARYAN
already_seen.abstract: Climate policy uncertainty drives market volatility, influencing investment in climate-sensitive and ethical assets, especially in Sharia-compliant regions like the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) where understanding its spillovers is vital for portfolio and economic resilience. Given this scenario, this study investigates the dynamic and asymmetric connectedness between climate policy uncertainty (CPU) and Islamic stock sectors in GCC countries, with implications for portfolio hedging. Using the TF-QVAR and asymmetric TVP-VAR models on data from February 2020 to April 2025, we uncover how CPU affects Islamic equities—a critical component of ethical investment. Findings reveal that connectedness intensifies during bearish (78.12%) and bullish (77.62%) regimes and weakens in normal conditions (35.95%), with CPU shifting from a net receiver to transmitter in stable markets. Industrials, Financials, and Energy sectors consistently transmit shocks, while CPU absorbs them; Healthcare, Utilities, and Consumer Services remain neutral. Spillovers are dynamic and asymmetric, with crises amplifying short-term spillovers and bullish phases driving long-term connections. Negative shocks generate stronger contagion than positive ones. Directionally, CPU and Consumer sectors are net receivers, with CPU's role varying by sentiment. Portfolio analysis shows that the MConP offers a stable balance of risk and return across sectors and market regimes, outperforming MVP in downturns and MCorP in upswings due to its adaptability to asymmetric returns. Policy recommendations include enhancing stabilization funds, promoting diversification beyond hydrocarbons, strengthening underperforming sectors, and deepening regional equity market integration to support more effective risk management . • Climate policy uncertainty (CPU) strongly influences GCC Islamic equities, with spillovers that vary across market regimes. • Connectedness is highest in bearish (78.12%) and bullish (77.62%) markets, but weakens in normal times (35.95%). • Industrials, Financials, and Energy sectors transmit shocks, while Healthcare, Utilities, and Consumer Services remain largely neutral. • Negative shocks create stronger contagion than positive ones, with CPU shifting between being a receiver and a transmitter depending on market sentiment. • The Minimum Connectedness Portfolio (MConP) outperforms traditional strategies, offering better hedging and resilience for investors in volatile markets.

_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 气候政策不确定性驱动市场波动，影响气候敏感型和道德型资产的投资，尤其是在海湾合作委员会（GCC）等符合伊斯兰教法的地区，理解其溢出效应对投资组合和经济韧性至关重要。基于此，本研究利用TF-QVAR和非对称TVP-VAR模型，基于2020年2月至2025年4月的数据，探讨了气候政策不确定性与GCC国家伊斯兰股票板块之间的动态和非对称关联性及其对投资组合对冲的影响。研究发现，关联性在熊市（78.12%）和牛市（77.62%）期间加剧，在正常条件下减弱（35.95%），且气候政策不确定性在稳定市场中从净接收者转变为传递者。工业、金融和能源板块持续传递冲击，而气候政策不确定性吸收冲击；医疗、公用事业和消费者服务板块保持中性。溢出效应是动态且非对称的，危机放大短期溢出，牛市阶段驱动长期关联。负面冲击比正面冲击产生更强的传染效应。从方向上看，气候政策不确定性和消费者板块是净接收者，且气候政策不确定性的角色随市场情绪变化。投资组合分析显示，最小关联性投资组合在不同板块和市场状态下提供了稳定的风险收益平衡，在下跌市场中优于最小方差投资组合，在上涨市场中优于最小相关性投资组合，因其能适应非对称收益。政策建议包括加强稳定基金、促进油气以外的多元化、加强表现不佳的板块以及深化区域股票市场一体化，以支持更有效的风险管理。• 气候政策不确定性强烈影响GCC伊斯兰股票，溢出效应随市场状态变化。• 关联性在熊市（78.12%）和牛市（77.62%）中最高，在正常时期减弱（35.95%）。• 工业、金融和能源板块传递冲击，而医疗、公用事业和消费者服务板块基本保持中性。• 负面冲击比正面冲击产生更强的传染效应，气候政策不确定性根据市场情绪在接收者和传递者之间切换。• 最小关联性投资组合优于传统策略，为波动市场中的投资者提供更好的对冲和韧性。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 2020年2月至2025年4月GCC国家伊斯兰股票板块数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 气候政策不确定性与GCC伊斯兰股票之间的关联性在市场极端状态下显著增强，且负面冲击的传染效应更强。

already_seen.title: Equity market liberalization and volatility spillovers: Evidence from “Mainland China–Hong Kong stock connect”
already_seen.authors: Zhuofan Hao; Qiqian Li; Ti Zhou
already_seen.abstract: This paper examines the impact of China’s equity market liberalization on cross-border volatility transmission between Mainland China and nine major international stock markets. Using option-implied volatility indices (VIX) as forward-looking measures of ex-ante market risk, we analyze volatility spillovers over the period from 2015 to 2023. Our empirical evidence reveals that China’s liberalization is associated with increasing directional volatility spillovers, with Hong Kong serving as a key intermediary—absorbing international volatility shocks and transmitting them to Mainland China. Notably, we document a unique upward trend in bi-directional spillovers between Mainland China and Hong Kong as liberalization progresses. Utilizing daily aggregate portfolio flow data from the Mainland–Hong Kong Stock Connect program, we identify short-term cross-border aggregate flows as an important driver of spillover intensity. Specifically, equity outflows from China (Hong Kong) significantly amplify volatility spillovers from Hong Kong (China) to China (Hong Kong). These results are robust after controlling for macro-financial conditions in both the US and China and persist in panel regressions with market and year fixed effects. Our findings contribute to the literature by quantifying the volatility spillover effects of China’s equity market liberalization through a forward-looking lens and by uncovering the role of portfolio outflows as an important channel for cross-border volatility transmission. • We construct a Chinese option-implied volatility index (VIX) and use daily VIX indices as forward-looking measures of ex-ante stock market risk to examine cross-border volatility spillovers between China and major international equity markets. • Equity market liberalization in China is associated with stronger directional spillovers between China and global markets. • The Hong Kong stock market serves as a major source of volatility spillovers to the Chinese stock market, and the directional spillovers between Mainland China and Hong Kong exhibit an increasing trend as China’s capital market liberalization deepens. • Short-term aggregate aggregate portfolio flows through the Shanghai–Hong Kong Stock Connect program are an important driver of directional spillovers between the Mainland China and Hong Kong stock markets.
already_seen.topics: Financial Risk and Volatility Modeling; Financial Markets and Investment Strategies; Market Dynamics and Volatility

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: This paper examines the impact of China’s equity market liberalization on cross-border volatility transmission between Mainland China and nine major international stock markets.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 本文研究了中国股市自由化对中国内地与九个主要国际股票市场之间跨境波动传导的影响。我们使用期权隐含波动率指数（VIX）作为事前市场风险的前瞻性指标，分析了2015年至2023年期间的波动溢出效应。实证证据表明，中国的自由化与方向性波动溢出的增强相关，其中香港作为关键中介——吸收国际波动冲击并将其传导至中国内地。值得注意的是，我们记录到随着自由化进程推进，中国内地与香港之间的双向溢出呈现独特的上升趋势。利用沪深港通计划的每日总组合流量数据，我们识别出短期跨境总流量是溢出强度的重要驱动因素。具体而言，来自中国（香港）的股票流出显著放大了从香港（中国）到中国（香港）的波动溢出。在控制美国和中国的宏观金融条件后，这些结果依然稳健，并在包含市场和年份固定效应的面板回归中持续成立。我们的发现通过前瞻性视角量化了中国股市自由化的波动溢出效应，并揭示了组合流出作为跨境波动传导重要渠道的作用。• 我们构建了中国期权隐含波动率指数（VIX），并使用每日VIX指数作为事前股票市场风险的前瞻性指标，研究中国与主要国际股票市场之间的跨境波动溢出。• 中国股市自由化与增强的中国与全球市场之间的方向性溢出相关。• 香港股市是中国股市波动溢出的主要来源，且随着中国资本市场自由化深化，中国内地与香港之间的方向性溢出呈现上升趋势。• 通过沪港通计划的短期总组合流量是中国内地与香港股市之间方向性溢出的重要驱动因素。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 2015-2023年期权隐含波动率指数（VIX）及沪深港通每日总组合流量数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 中国股市自由化通过香港中介增强了跨境波动溢出，且短期组合流出是重要传导渠道。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 该研究聚焦于金融市场的波动溢出效应，与保障房、劳动力流动、财政竞争等核心话题无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: Family relationships, pro-social preferences, and household charitable donations: an empirical study of altruistic resource allocation in Chinese families
already_seen.authors: Chunyan Li; Jinsi Liu
already_seen.abstract: Family relationships have a significant impact on family economic activities, yet few scholars have examined their influence on family charitable giving. This study integrates relevant theories of family function, family economics, and behavioral economics to construct an analytical framework for family altruistic resource allocation, aiming to elucidate the process mechanism of "family relations - prosocial preferences - family charitable donations". Based on three periods of the China Family Panel Studies (CFPS) in 2018, 2020, and 2022, this study systematically examines the impact and mechanism of family relationships on family charitable donations. The results show that (1) Family relationships promote family charitable donations. The better the family relationship, the greater the possibility of family participation in charitable donations, and the higher the level of donations. (2) Among different types of family relationships, the closeness of the nuclear-kin family relationship has a particularly prominent positive impact on family charitable donation behavior and donation levels. (3) Family members' prosocial preferences may be a potential mediating mechanism between family relationships and family charitable donations. Specifically, both nuclear family relationships and nuclear-kin families may promote family participation in charitable donations by enhancing family members' sense of happiness, interpersonal relationships, and social trust. Family members' life satisfaction may also mediate between nuclear family relationships and family charitable donations; however, this mechanism did not show a significant mediating effect between nuclear kin and family charitable donations. This study not only enriches the existing literature on family altruistic resource allocation decisions and behaviors, but also has certain reference value for activating public charitable donation behavior.

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Family relationships have a significant impact on family economic activities, yet few scholars have examined their influence on family charitable giving.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 家庭关系对家庭经济活动具有显著影响，但鲜有学者探讨其对家庭慈善捐赠的影响。本研究整合家庭功能、家庭经济学和行为经济学的相关理论，构建家庭利他资源配置分析框架，旨在阐明"家庭关系-亲社会偏好-家庭慈善捐赠"的过程机制。基于2018年、2020年和2022年三期中国家庭追踪调查（CFPS）数据，本研究系统考察了家庭关系对家庭慈善捐赠的影响及其作用机制。结果表明：（1）家庭关系促进家庭慈善捐赠。家庭关系越好，家庭参与慈善捐赠的可能性越大，捐赠水平越高。（2）在不同类型的家庭关系中，核心亲属家庭关系的亲密度对家庭慈善捐赠行为和捐赠水平具有尤为突出的正向影响。（3）家庭成员亲社会偏好可能是家庭关系与家庭慈善捐赠之间的潜在中介机制。具体而言，核心家庭关系和核心亲属家庭均可能通过提升家庭成员的幸福感、人际关系和社会信任来促进家庭参与慈善捐赠。家庭成员的生活满意度也可能在核心家庭关系与家庭慈善捐赠之间发挥中介作用；但该机制在核心亲属与家庭慈善捐赠之间未表现出显著的中介效应。本研究不仅丰富了现有关于家庭利他资源配置决策与行为的文献，而且对激活公众慈善捐赠行为具有一定的参考价值。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_METHOD: 描述性分析、中介效应检验
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 中国家庭追踪调查（CFPS）2018、2020、2022年三期数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 家庭关系越好，家庭参与慈善捐赠的可能性和捐赠水平越高，核心亲属关系尤为突出，亲社会偏好是重要中介机制。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 该研究聚焦家庭慈善捐赠行为，与保障房、住房补贴、劳动力流动、财政竞争等核心话题无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: Exploring Heterogeneity in the Impact of Financial Inclusion on MSMEs’ Performance
already_seen.authors: Miao He; Ye Bai; Fan Liu; Michalis P. Stamatogiannis
already_seen.abstract: This study investigates the impact of financial inclusion on micro, small, and medium-sized enterprises (MSMEs) performance. By using a unique firm-level survey dataset comprising 2,229 MSMEs in China, with an Instrument Variable approach controlling for endogeneity issue, we find that credit access significantly enhances MSMEs’ performance. The availability of formal finance is particularly crucial for the development of MSMEs that are more financially excluded, such as urban, low-tech, unlisted MSMEs, and those located in regions with lower economic development. These findings underscore the importance of financial inclusion in fostering the growth and performance of MSMEs, especially in underserved regions and sectors. For policymakers, enhancing access to formal credit for financially excluded firms can drive economic growth convergence.

already_seen.title: The Bright Side of Bank Liquidity Creation for Financial Stability: Evidence from China
already_seen.authors: Jiawei Guo; Frank Yong Wang; Jiwen Chai
already_seen.abstract: Based on data from China commercial banks from 2005Q1 to 2022Q4, this paper systematically studies the impact of liquidity creation on systemic risk, emphasizing the crucial role of liquidity creation in maintaining financial stability. Our findings consistently reveal a positive relationship, indicating that liquidity creation by commercial banks can reduce the probability of individual bank liquidity risks through capital channel, and limit the contagion and amplification effects of systemic risk through market liquidity channel. Further analysis reveals that large banks, compared to smaller banks, have a more significant positive impact on financial stability through liquidity creation per unit of assets. However, for banks overly reliant on wholesale funding, increased liquidity creation may lead to the accumulation of systemic risk. This study provides important empirical evidence for the formulation of future bank liquidity regulation policies and the prevention and management of financial crises.

already_seen.title: Generative AI–Based Readability as a Measure of Disclosure Quality: Evidence from ESG Rating Divergence
already_seen.authors: Xincan Qiu; Xiaolin Gan; Chenglong Zhang
already_seen.abstract: ESG ratings have become an increasingly important tool for evaluating firms’ non-financial performance. However, substantial divergences across rating agencies weaken their credibility and exacerbate information asymmetry in capital markets. Using CSR reports of Chinese listed companies from 2015 to 2023, this study develops a novel readability metric based on GPT-4.1, fine-tuned with domain-specific corpora. The fine-tuned model outperformed traditional lexical measures and the non-fine-tuned model in scoring stability, discriminative power, and contextual adaptability, thus advancing from simple “model application” to “framework innovation.” In addition, AI-assessed readability was significantly and negatively associated with ESG rating divergence, indicating that higher disclosure quality helps reduce inter-agency disagreement and information asymmetry. In contrast, conventional lexical indicators exhibited no significant effect. Further analysis demonstrated that corporate greenwashing weakened this mitigating role. Mechanism tests provide evidence that readability reduces divergence primarily by improving disclosure quality and limiting negative media sentiment. The effect was stronger among firms with green investors, higher-quality firm–investor interactions, and Global Reporting Initiative-based reporting. Sub-dimension analysis revealed that readability mainly alleviated divergence in the social and governance dimensions, while showing a limited impact on the environmental dimension. This study highlights the essential role of non-financial disclosure quality in enhancing the information environment and improving ESG rating consistency, offering novel financial evidence for investors’ risk assessment and regulatory policy refinement. • Fine-tuned GPT-4.1 captures CSR readability better than traditional measures. • Higher AI-readability scores reduce ESG rating divergence across agencies. • Greenwashing weakens the role of CSR readability in reducing ESG rating divergence. • Effects are stronger with green investors, GRI reporting, and voluntary disclosure. • Disclosure quality and media sentiment explain the readability effect.
already_seen.topics: Auditing, Earnings Management, Governance; Corporate Social Responsibility Reporting; Impact of AI and Big Data on Business and Society

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: ESG ratings have become an increasingly important tool for evaluating firms’ non-financial performance.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: ESG评级已成为评估企业非财务绩效日益重要的工具。然而，不同评级机构之间的重大分歧削弱了其可信度，并加剧了资本市场的信息不对称。本研究利用2015年至2023年中国上市公司的企业社会责任报告，基于GPT-4.1开发了一种新颖的可读性指标，并使用特定领域语料库进行了微调。微调后的模型在评分稳定性、区分能力和上下文适应性方面优于传统的词汇度量和未微调模型，从而从简单的“模型应用”推进到“框架创新”。此外，人工智能评估的可读性与ESG评级分歧显著负相关，表明更高的披露质量有助于减少机构间分歧和信息不对称。相比之下，传统的词汇指标未显示出显著效果。进一步分析表明，企业“漂绿”行为削弱了这种缓解作用。机制检验提供的证据表明，可读性主要通过提高披露质量和限制负面媒体情绪来减少分歧。这种效应在拥有绿色投资者、高质量企业与投资者互动以及基于全球报告倡议报告的企业中更为显著。子维度分析显示，可读性主要缓解了社会与治理维度的分歧，而对环境维度的影响有限。本研究强调了非财务披露质量在改善信息环境和提高ESG评级一致性方面的关键作用，为投资者风险评估和监管政策完善提供了新颖的金融证据。• 微调后的GPT-4.1比传统度量更好地捕捉企业社会责任报告可读性。• 较高的人工智能可读性评分降低了跨机构的ESG评级分歧。• “漂绿”行为削弱了企业社会责任报告可读性在减少ESG评级分歧中的作用。• 在拥有绿色投资者、采用全球报告倡议报告和自愿披露的企业中，效应更强。• 披露质量和媒体情绪解释了可读性效应。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_METHOD: 描述性统计与回归分析
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 2015年至2023年中国上市公司企业社会责任报告
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 基于GPT-4.1微调模型评估的企业社会责任报告可读性越高，ESG评级分歧越小，且该效应主要通过提高披露质量和限制负面媒体情绪实现。

already_seen.title: Mitigating the Innovation Constraints of Supply Chain Concentration: An Operational Resilience Perspective
already_seen.authors: Xiantai Hong; Lingrui Li; Yingbo Wen
already_seen.abstract: This study integrates network embeddedness theory and the dynamic capability view to explore the impact of upstream and downstream supply chain concentration (supplier and customer concentration, respectively) on corporate innovation, and the moderating effect of operational resilience and its industry heterogeneity. Analysing data from Chinese A-share listed firms from 2014 to 2022 reveals that both supplier and customer concentration significantly inhibit corporate innovation. Meanwhile, operational resilience can somewhat reduce the negative effects in both cases. However, this effect is structurally uneven. Specifically, it is significant only for downstream customer concentration, while its impact on upstream supplier concentration is not significant. In addition, this moderating effect varies across high-tech and non-high-tech industries, and between competitive and regulated industries. Furthermore, the inhibitory effects of supplier and customer concentration on innovation also exhibit heterogeneity between high-tech and non-high-tech industries, and between competitive and regulated industries. Overall, this study reveals the constraining effect of the supply chain structure on firm innovation and the moderating role of operational resilience. This provides valuable empirical evidence for firms to optimise their innovation strategies and enhance their dynamic response capabilities in complex supply chain environments. • Supplier and customer concentration both suppress corporate innovation. • Resilience buffers customer concentration impact, but not for suppliers. • Resilience's moderating role varies between high-tech and other sectors. • Resilience's impact differs across competitive and regulated industries.
already_seen.topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management; Innovation and Knowledge Management; Quality and Supply Management

_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 本研究整合网络嵌入性理论与动态能力视角，探讨上下游供应链集中度（即供应商集中度与客户集中度）对企业创新的影响，以及运营韧性及其行业异质性的调节效应。通过分析2014年至2022年中国A股上市公司的数据发现，供应商集中度和客户集中度均显著抑制企业创新。同时，运营韧性在一定程度上能够缓解这两种情况下的负面影响。然而，这种效应在结构上是不均衡的。具体而言，运营韧性仅对下游客户集中度的抑制作用具有显著调节效果，而对上游供应商集中度的影响则不显著。此外，这种调节效应在高科技与非高科技行业之间，以及竞争性行业与管制性行业之间存在差异。进一步地，供应商集中度和客户集中度对创新的抑制作用在高科技与非高科技行业之间、竞争性行业与管制性行业之间也表现出异质性。总体而言，本研究揭示了供应链结构对企业创新的约束效应以及运营韧性的调节作用，为企业优化创新策略、提升复杂供应链环境下的动态响应能力提供了有价值的实证证据。• 供应商和客户集中度均抑制企业创新。• 运营韧性缓冲了客户集中度的影响，但对供应商集中度无效。• 运营韧性的调节作用在高科技行业与其他行业之间存在差异。• 运营韧性的影响在竞争性行业与管制性行业之间有所不同。

already_seen.title: Digital technological innovation, economic agglomeration, and digital business environment: Spatial effects and mechanisms based on Institutional Logic Theory
already_seen.authors: Diandian Zhang; Xinling Zhang
already_seen.abstract: Accelerating the shift from traditional to digital business environments is critical for nations aiming to capture development opportunities and strengthen global competitiveness. In this context, digital technological innovation serves as a key driver of digital business environment optimization. Grounded in institutional logic theory, this study examines the underlying mechanism linking digital technological innovation to the digital business environment through the lens of economic agglomeration. It empirically investigates both the direct and spatial effects of digital technological innovation, with a particular focus on the mediating and nonlinear moderating roles of economic agglomeration. Empirical results show that although the digital business environment has improved nationally on an annual basis, significant regional disparities remain, with eastern regions exhibiting higher levels of development. Digital technological innovation has a significantly positive effect on the digital business environment, a finding robust to multiple specification checks. Furthermore, digital technological innovation not only enhances the local digital business environment but also generates positive spillovers to neighboring regions. Economic agglomeration plays a dual role in this process, acting as a positive mediator and a negative moderator. The effect of digital technological innovation also varies across cities of different sizes and administrative tiers. This study provides empirical evidence on the relationship between digital technological innovation and the digital business environment, highlighting the complex and nonlinear societal implications of digital technological innovation. • Digital business environment has improved annually, yet regional disparities remain. • Digital technological innovation positively affects digital business environment. • Digital technological innovation generates positive spatial spillover effects. • Economic agglomeration acts as dual mediator and negative moderator.
already_seen.topics: Regional Economics and Spatial Analysis; Global Urban Networks and Dynamics; Smart Cities and Technologies

already_seen.title: Outward Foreign Direct Investment and Green Energy Penetration: Evidence from Global South Economies
already_seen.authors: Muhammad Adnan Bashir; Mustafa Tevfik Kartal; Qing Li; Zuchang Zhong; Ummara Razi
already_seen.abstract: This study examines how outward foreign direct investment (OFDI) and green transitions have an asymmetric effect on green energy penetration (GEPN) among economies in the Global South between 2001 and 2022. The existing literature has investigated the environmental impacts of OFDI, there is minimal information regarding the effect of this phenomenon on the use of renewable energy, especially in developing countries, which are typified by poor institutions, dependence on fossil fuels, and inefficiencies in their structures. To address the gap, this study develops a new GEPN index of the relative efficiency of consumption of renewable energy to supply and use advanced panel quantile regressions of Method of Moments Quantile Regression (MMQR) and bootstrapped quantile regression (BSQR) as a robustness model to capture cross-sectional dependence, slope heterogeneity, and distributional asymmetries. The empirical results indicate that the OFDI contributes greatly to GEPN at larger quantiles, which can be attributed to the filter-out hypothesis, according to which the foreign investments in clean energy would be used to generate reverse technology spillovers and institutional learning within the origin countries. Industrial and agricultural development, on the other hand, does not have homogeneous negative impacts, meaning that structural dependence on fossil-based sectors negatively affects the adoption of green energy. Statistically, however, environmental technologies are statistically insignificant down the quantiles, indicating implementation bottlenecks and low absorptive capacity. The quality of governance continuously enhances GEPN, whereas the process of urbanization has a negative impact because of infrastructural facilities that are based on fossil fuels and consumption habits that are unsustainable. The results suggest that the scaling of green energy in the Global South needs to be based not only on the OFDI in the renewables but also on the alignment of industrial, urban, and agricultural policies with the green transitions. To transform the technological potential into reality in the form of real green energy gains, it is important to strengthen institutional quality and reform incentive structures. • OFDI promotes green energy penetration in higher-performing Global South economies • A new index measures efficiency of renewable energy use relative to supply • Strong governance amplifies the OFDI–green energy relationship • Industrial and agricultural growth constrain renewable energy penetration • Quantile analysis reveals heterogeneous policy and utility-sector effects

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: This study examines how outward foreign direct investment (OFDI) and green transitions have an asymmetric effect on green energy penetration (GEPN) among economies in the Global South between 2001 and 2022.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 本研究考察了2001年至2022年间，全球南方经济体的对外直接投资（OFDI）与绿色转型如何对绿色能源渗透（GEPN）产生非对称效应。现有文献已探讨了OFDI的环境影响，但关于这一现象对可再生能源使用的影响信息极少，尤其是在以制度薄弱、依赖化石燃料和结构低效为特征的发展中国家。为填补这一空白，本研究开发了一个新的GEPN指数，衡量可再生能源消费相对于供给的相对效率，并采用先进的面板分位数回归方法——矩分位数回归（MMQR）和作为稳健性模型的Bootstrap分位数回归（BSQR），以捕捉横截面依赖性、斜率异质性和分布非对称性。实证结果表明，OFDI在较高分位数上对GEPN贡献显著，这可归因于过滤假说，即清洁能源领域的对外投资将在母国产生反向技术溢出和制度学习。另一方面，工业和农业发展并未产生同质的负面影响，这意味着对化石燃料部门的结构性依赖会阻碍绿色能源的采用。然而，从统计上看，环境技术在各分位数上均不显著，表明存在实施瓶颈和低吸收能力。治理质量持续提升GEPN，而城市化进程因基于化石燃料的基础设施和不可持续的消费习惯而产生负面影响。结果表明，全球南方扩大绿色能源规模不仅需要基于可再生能源领域的OFDI，还需要将工业、城市和农业政策与绿色转型相协调。要将技术潜力转化为实际的绿色能源收益，加强制度质量和改革激励结构至关重要。• OFDI促进了全球南方高绩效经济体的绿色能源渗透 • 新指数衡量了可再生能源使用相对于供给的效率 • 强有力的治理放大了OFDI与绿色能源的关系 • 工业和农业发展制约了可再生能源渗透 • 分位数分析揭示了异质性的政策和公用事业部门效应
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 2001-2022年全球南方经济体面板数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 对外直接投资在较高分位数上显著促进绿色能源渗透，但工业和农业发展因化石燃料依赖而阻碍绿色能源采用。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 研究聚焦于全球南方国家的对外直接投资与绿色能源关系，与核心话题（保障房、劳动力流动、财政竞争等）及proxy话题均无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: Comparative analysis of volatility proxies and regime-based asset allocation
already_seen.authors: Wanderci Alves Bitencourt; Robert Aldo Iquiapaza
already_seen.abstract: High uncertainty and increasing interconnectivity in global financial markets challenge static asset allocation strategies, particularly in emerging economies. This study evaluates the effectiveness of three volatility proxies (conditional, implied, and historical) in identifying market regimes through a Hidden Markov Model and examines their economic relevance for ETF allocation in Brazil and the United States using daily data from 2018 to 2024, with portfolio evaluation focused on the 2020–2024 out-of-sample period. The results indicate that conditional volatility estimated via GARCH provides more stable and operationally reliable regime identification. Model selection based on the Bayesian Information Criterion supports a three-regime specification (low, medium, and high volatility), allowing the model to capture not only extreme market states but also transitional phases often overlooked in binary frameworks. A key contribution of the study is the identification of an international risk transmission mechanism. Granger causality tests applied to regime probabilities reveal that increases in the probability of high-volatility regimes in the U.S. market precede regime shifts in the Brazilian market, suggesting that U.S. volatility regimes function as an early warning system for emerging markets. In asset allocation, the dynamic regime-based strategy outperforms static mean–variance optimization (Single Regime) in risk-adjusted terms in Brazil while successfully mitigating severe losses in the U.S. market. However, the dynamic strategy does not outperform the naive equal-weighted (1/N) benchmark, highlighting the trade-off between dynamic adaptability and estimation error under high-correlation environments. Overall, the findings suggest that regime-based strategies are best interpreted as risk-management tools rather than universal return-enhancing solutions. • GARCH outperforms implied measures regarding regime stability in emerging markets. • Three-regime models capture transitional phases overlooked by binary frameworks. • U.S. regime probabilities act as an exogenous Early Warning System for Brazil. • Dynamic allocation enhances risk-adjusted performance and preserves capital versus static strategies. • High local risk-free rates significantly compress risk premiums in emerging markets.
already_seen.topics: Financial Risk and Volatility Modeling; Financial Markets and Investment Strategies; Market Dynamics and Volatility

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: High uncertainty and increasing interconnectivity in global financial markets challenge static asset allocation strategies, particularly in emerging economies.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 全球金融市场的高度不确定性和日益增强的互联性对静态资产配置策略构成了挑战，尤其是在新兴经济体中。本研究通过隐马尔可夫模型，评估了三种波动率代理指标（条件波动率、隐含波动率和历史波动率）在识别市场状态方面的有效性，并利用2018年至2024年的日度数据，考察了它们对巴西和美国ETF配置的经济相关性，投资组合评估聚焦于2020-2024年的样本外期间。结果表明，通过GARCH模型估计的条件波动率能提供更稳定且操作上更可靠的状态识别。基于贝叶斯信息准则的模型选择支持三状态设定（低、中、高波动率），这使得模型不仅能捕捉极端市场状态，还能捕捉二元框架中常被忽略的过渡阶段。本研究的一个关键贡献是识别了一种国际风险传导机制。对状态概率进行的格兰杰因果检验显示，美国市场高波动率状态概率的增加先于巴西市场的状态转换，这表明美国波动率状态可作为新兴市场的早期预警系统。在资产配置方面，动态状态策略在巴西的风险调整后收益上优于静态均值-方差优化（单状态），同时在美国市场成功减轻了严重损失。然而，动态策略并未优于简单的等权重（1/N）基准，这凸显了在高相关性环境下动态适应性与估计误差之间的权衡。总体而言，研究结果表明，状态策略最好被解释为风险管理工具，而非普遍提升收益的解决方案。• GARCH在状态稳定性方面优于新兴市场的隐含波动率指标。• 三状态模型捕捉了二元框架忽略的过渡阶段。• 美国状态概率作为巴西的外生早期预警系统。• 动态配置相对于静态策略提升了风险调整后表现并保住了资本。• 高无风险利率显著压缩了新兴市场的风险溢价。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_METHOD: 理论（隐马尔可夫模型、GARCH、格兰杰因果检验、投资组合优化）
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 2018-2024年巴西和美国ETF的日度数据，样本外评估期为2020-2024年
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 基于GARCH条件波动率的三状态模型能有效识别市场状态，其中美国高波动状态可作为巴西市场的早期预警，动态状态策略在风险调整后优于静态策略但未超越等权重基准。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 该研究聚焦于金融市场的波动率代理指标比较和资产配置策略，与保障房、住房补贴、劳动力流动、财政竞争等核心话题无任何关联。

already_seen.title: Shadow Leverage and Corporate Downside Risk: Evidence from Investment Crashes
already_seen.authors: Nargis Sultana; Fahad Zeya
already_seen.abstract: This paper examines how hidden balance-sheet obligations captured by shadow leverage shape firms’ investment behavior and risk exposure. Using a large international panel of publicly listed firms drawn from the Compustat Fundamentals database and controlling for firm, year, and industry–year fixed effects, we show that shadow leverage does not induce gradual adjustments in average investment or financing policies. Instead, it operates primarily through liquidity management and downside risk. Firms with higher shadow leverage accumulate significantly more cash but do not systematically reduce capital expenditures or R&D intensity. This relationship is nonlinear: precautionary cash hoarding is concentrated at moderate levels of shadow leverage and dissipates once hidden liabilities exceed a threshold. We further show that shadow leverage strongly predicts the probability of large investment collapses. In fixed-effects logit models, increases in shadow leverage significantly raise the likelihood of discrete investment crashes, even after controlling for firm size, profitability, asset tangibility, growth opportunities, and conventional leverage. Dynamic tests reveal that this effect is sharply concentrated at the immediate lag and is absent for future (placebo) values of shadow leverage, while reverse-causality tests show that investment crashes do not predict subsequent changes in shadow leverage. The results are robust to alternative measures of shadow leverage that adjust for uncertainty and accounting composition. Taken together, the evidence indicates that shadow leverage functions as a latent risk-accumulation mechanism: firms respond to hidden liabilities by hoarding liquidity rather than gradually reducing investment, but these risks ultimately materialize through sudden and severe investment collapses.
already_seen.topics: Corporate Finance and Governance; Family Business Performance and Succession; Corporate Insolvency and Governance

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: This paper examines how hidden balance-sheet obligations captured by shadow leverage shape firms’ investment behavior and risk exposure.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 本文研究了影子杠杆所代表的隐性资产负债表义务如何影响企业的投资行为和风险敞口。利用来自Compustat Fundamentals数据库的大型国际上市公司面板数据，并控制公司、年份和行业-年份固定效应，我们发现影子杠杆并不会导致平均投资或融资政策的渐进调整。相反，它主要通过流动性管理和下行风险发挥作用。影子杠杆较高的企业会积累显著更多的现金，但并未系统性地减少资本支出或研发强度。这种关系是非线性的：预防性现金囤积集中在影子杠杆处于中等水平时，一旦隐性负债超过某个阈值，这种效应就会消失。我们进一步证明，影子杠杆能强有力地预测大规模投资崩溃的概率。在固定效应Logit模型中，即使控制了公司规模、盈利能力、资产有形性、增长机会和传统杠杆，影子杠杆的增加也会显著提高离散投资崩溃的可能性。动态检验显示，这种效应急剧集中在紧邻的滞后一期，而对未来（安慰剂）的影子杠杆值则不存在；反向因果检验表明，投资崩溃并不能预测影子杠杆随后的变化。结果对于调整了不确定性和会计构成后的影子杠杆替代度量指标依然稳健。综合来看，证据表明影子杠杆作为一种潜在的风险积累机制发挥作用：企业通过囤积流动性而非逐步减少投资来应对隐性负债，但这些风险最终会通过突然且严重的投资崩溃而显现出来。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_METHOD: 固定效应面板回归、固定效应Logit模型、动态检验、反向因果检验
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: Compustat Fundamentals数据库中的大型国际上市公司面板数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 影子杠杆通过流动性囤积而非投资渐进调整影响企业，最终导致投资崩溃风险显著上升。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 该文研究企业金融与投资行为，与保障房、劳动力流动、财政竞争等核心话题无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: Gender-specific labour market shocks and household bargaining power.
already_seen.authors: Rania Gihleb; Osea Giuntella; Dor Morag
already_seen.abstract: Abstract Using machine learning and product-level data on single men’s and single women’s consumption patterns, we develop an index that quantifies the „gendered‟ nature of consumer goods. We use the index to investigate how gender-specific labour market shocks influence spending patterns within heterosexual households. Our findings reveal that industrial robot adoption, which worsened men’s relative economic position, shifted household consumption toward products predominantly purchased by single women. In contrast, the expansion of fracking, which boosted demand for young and less skilled men, yields suggestive but less robust evidence of increased spending on goods favoured by single men. Although neither shock significantly altered total spending on children’s products, robot exposure led to a reallocation of spending toward goods more commonly purchased for daughters than for sons.
already_seen.topics: Gender, Labor, and Family Dynamics; Names, Identity, and Discrimination Research; Consumer Market Behavior and Pricing

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Using machine learning and product-level data on single men’s and single women’s consumption patterns, we develop an index that quantifies the „gendered‟ nature of consumer goods.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 摘要 利用机器学习方法以及单身男性和单身女性消费模式的产品级数据，我们构建了一个衡量消费品“性别化”程度的指数。我们利用该指数研究性别特异性劳动力市场冲击如何影响异性恋家庭内部的支出模式。研究结果显示，工业机器人的采用恶化了男性的相对经济地位，促使家庭消费转向主要由单身女性购买的产品。相比之下，水力压裂法的扩张增加了对年轻且技能较低的男性的需求，但仅提供了暗示性且稳健性较弱的证据，表明家庭增加了对单身男性偏好商品的支出。尽管这两种冲击均未显著改变儿童产品的总支出，但机器人接触导致家庭支出重新分配，更多地转向通常为女儿而非儿子购买的商品。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 产品级消费数据（单身男性和单身女性）
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 性别特异性劳动力市场冲击（如机器人采用）会改变家庭内部消费的性别偏向，但未显著影响儿童产品总支出。

already_seen.title: Bounds, Benefits, and Bad Air: Net Benefits of Pollution Alerts
already_seen.authors: Michael Anderson; Minwoo Hyun; Jaecheol Lee
already_seen.abstract: Abstract Though air-quality alert systems (AQAS) cover more than 1.7 billion people worldwide, there has been little analysis of the net benefits of these systems. This paper presents a theoretical framework for deriving lower bounds on the net benefits of an AQAS and applies it to a South Korean system currently covering over 51 million people. Estimating a regression discontinuity design, we find that an alert issuance reduced youth respiratory expenditures by 30% and adult cardiovascular expenditures by 23%. The overall system reduced externalised health expenditures by 28.6 million dollars during 2016−2017, with a minimum benefit-cost ratio of 7.1:1. Including dynamic impacts of alerts increases the minimum benefits (benefit-cost ratio) to 36.7 million dollars (9.2:1). Our findings imply that the AQAS generates significant net benefits and suggests that manipulation of air quality data, which has been observed in other contexts, may negatively impact social net benefits.
already_seen.topics: Air Quality and Health Impacts; Air Quality Monitoring and Forecasting; Indoor Air Quality and Microbial Exposure

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Though air-quality alert systems (AQAS) cover more than 1.7 billion people worldwide, there has been little analysis of the net benefits of these systems.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 摘要：尽管空气质量警报系统（AQAS）覆盖全球超过17亿人口，但关于这些系统净收益的分析却很少。本文提出了一个理论框架，用于推导AQAS净收益的下界，并将其应用于目前覆盖超过5100万人口的韩国系统。通过估计断点回归设计，我们发现警报发布使青少年呼吸系统医疗支出减少30%，成年人心血管医疗支出减少23%。在2016-2017年间，整个系统减少了2860万美元的外部化医疗支出，最低收益成本比为7.1:1。纳入警报的动态影响后，最低收益（收益成本比）增至3670万美元（9.2:1）。我们的研究结果表明，AQAS产生了显著的净收益，并暗示在其他情境中观察到的空气质量数据操纵可能对社会净收益产生负面影响。

_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 韩国空气质量警报系统在2016-2017年间产生显著净收益，最低收益成本比为7.1:1。

already_seen.title: Campaigning to a Polarised Electorate: Emotions and Information in Real Election Campaigns
already_seen.authors: Cesi Cruz; Julien Labonne; Francesco Trebbi
already_seen.abstract: Abstract Political polarisation has reshaped electoral competition in many democracies, presenting traditional programmatic political parties with a dual challenge: finding ways to make policy-based campaigning resonate with voters without exacerbating partisan divisions. We partner with a mainstream opposition party to implement a field experiment during the 2019 Philippine Senatorial election to compare two common campaign strategies—direct policy-focused canvassing and an emotional engagement component—to assess both their electoral effects and their implications for polarisation. We find that, even in polarised contexts, in-person engagement providing policy information increases votes for the party. Both strategies increase learning, and importantly, neither strategy produces backlash among pro-incumbent voters; if anything, evidence suggests cross-cutting moderating effects. These results suggest that mainstream parties can communicate policy effectively even in highly polarised contexts, and that direct policy and emotional engagement need not exacerbate partisan divides.
already_seen.topics: Electoral Systems and Political Participation; Populism, Right-Wing Movements; Media Influence and Politics

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: Political polarisation has reshaped electoral competition in many democracies, presenting traditional programmatic political parties with a dual challenge: finding ways to make policy-based campaigning resonate with voters without exacerbating partisan divisions.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 政治极化重塑了许多民主国家的选举竞争，给传统的纲领性政党带来了双重挑战：既要让基于政策的竞选活动引起选民共鸣，又不能加剧党派分歧。我们与一个主流反对党合作，在2019年菲律宾参议院选举期间实施了一项实地实验，比较了两种常见的竞选策略——直接以政策为重点的拉票活动和情感参与成分——以评估它们的选举效果及其对极化的影响。我们发现，即使在极化背景下，提供政策信息的面对面接触也能增加该党的得票数。两种策略都增加了选民的学习，重要的是，两种策略都没有在亲现任选民中引起反弹；如果有任何影响，证据表明存在跨党派的缓和效应。这些结果表明，即使在高度极化的背景下，主流政党也能有效地传达政策，而且直接的政策沟通和情感参与不一定会加剧党派分歧。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_METHOD: 实验（实地实验/田野实验）
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 2019年菲律宾参议院选举期间，与一个主流反对党合作实施的实地实验数据
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 即使在高度政治极化背景下，提供政策信息的面对面接触能增加政党得票数，且不会引发亲现任选民的反弹，反而可能产生跨党派的缓和效应。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 该研究聚焦于选举政治中的竞选策略与极化问题，与保障房、住房补贴、劳动力流动、财政竞争等核心话题无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: Retrospectives: The Great Dollar-Shortage Debate
already_seen.authors: Harris Dellas; George S. Tavlas
already_seen.abstract: The dollar shortage debate—Paul Samuelson called it “the big open question of our time”—dominated international macroeconomics in the 15 years following the end of World War II. There were two main views regarding its cause: financial frictions that limited capital flows to Western Europe (Kindleberger); and overvalued fixed exchange rates versus the US dollar (Friedman). According to Kindleberger the dollar shortage was attenuated by two real factors that contributed to current account deficits: a large technological gap between the United States and Europe; and European impatience to improve living standards. Kindleberger believed that the current account deficit would prove chronic because of the persistence of the productivity gap, a view that was challenged by Bloomfield who argued that it would dissipate through income growth in Europe. We argue that Kindelberger’s analytical framework is closely connected to the modern intertemporal approach to current account determination; and, also, that the international reserve function of the US dollar—the Triffin dilemma—did not play a role in the dollar shortage.

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: The dollar shortage debate dominated international macroeconomics in the 15 years following World War II, with Kindleberger attributing it to financial frictions and a persistent productivity gap, while Friedman blamed overvalued fixed exchange rates.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 美元短缺之争——保罗·萨缪尔森称之为“我们时代尚未解决的重大开放性问题”——在二战结束后的15年间主导了国际宏观经济学领域。关于其成因存在两种主要观点：一是限制资本流向西欧的金融摩擦（金德尔伯格）；二是相对于美元被高估的固定汇率（弗里德曼）。金德尔伯格认为，美元短缺因两个导致经常账户赤字的实际因素而减弱：美国与欧洲之间巨大的技术差距；以及欧洲改善生活水平的迫切愿望。金德尔伯格相信，由于生产率差距的持续性，经常账户赤字将呈现长期性特征，这一观点遭到布卢姆菲尔德的质疑，后者认为该赤字将通过欧洲收入增长而消散。我们认为，金德尔伯格的分析框架与现代经常账户决定的跨期方法密切相关；同时，美元的国际储备功能——特里芬难题——在美元短缺中并未发挥作用。

_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 金德尔伯格关于美元短缺的分析框架与现代跨期经常账户理论相通，且特里芬难题并非当时美元短缺的成因。

already_seen.title: Substitutes for Success? Public Versus Private Competition in Medicare Advantage
already_seen.authors: Tim Layton; Luca Maini; J. Michael McWilliams
already_seen.abstract: We assess the evolving role of competition in Medicare Advantage and its implications for beneficiary welfare. We describe how competition from the public option, traditional Medicare, and other private insurers within Medicare Advantage act as substitutes in incentivizing plans to deliver value. We show that while historically the choice between traditional Medicare and Medicare Advantage provided a vital competitive dynamic, traditional Medicare's strength as a competitor has declined significantly, driven by generous payments favoring private plans. Consequently, the burden of ensuring value for enrollees has shifted to competition within the Medicare Advantage market. While county-level competition among private insurers has increased, this growth is primarily driven by the expansion of large national carriers rather than new entrants. Insurers still wield substantial market power due to significant barriers to entry, raising concerns about the ability of the program to incentivize private insurers to use public dollars to maximize value for beneficiaries.

already_seen.title: The Current Era of Health Care Consolidation
already_seen.authors: Michael R. Richards; Christopher Whaley
already_seen.abstract: Consolidation in the last few decades has reshaped the organization and structure of US health care markets, among both providers and insurers. Nearly all US hospital and insurer markets exceed established regulatory thresholds for competitive markets, and over half of physicians are now employed by a hospital or health system, which can increase spending for patients, payers, and taxpayers. Increased supply-side concentration can alter the balance of negotiations between providers and insurers. Prices for patients with commercial insurance are approximately 2.5 times the prices paid by those with public insurance. High and variable prices have minimal link with higher quality, and the United States leads peer nations in health care spending. These dynamics have created ongoing national debates over an “affordability crisis” and generates frustrations with the US health care system. This article discusses sources of rising health care spending and potential policy solutions.

already_seen.title: Competition in Health Insurance Markets
already_seen.authors: Martin Gaynor; Amanda Starc
already_seen.abstract: The United States relies primarily on private health insurance markets, yet these markets are highly concentrated and becoming more so over time. We document concentration across commercial, Medicare Advantage, and Medicaid markets. We then examine how asymmetric information—particularly adverse selection—interacts with market power to shape premiums, plan design, and consumer welfare. Empirical evidence confirms that insurer consolidation raises premiums. We discuss how antitrust enforcement, risk adjustment, regulation, and informational interventions shape competition and consumer welfare in these markets.

already_seen.title: Understanding Medicaid Managed Care: The Procured Competition Model
already_seen.authors: Mark Shepard; Jacob Wallace
already_seen.abstract: Medicaid is one of the largest public programs in the United States—providing health insurance to over 75 million low-income Americans—and over three quarters of its enrollees receive care via private “managed care” insurers. In this article, we make three central points about the economics of contracting out Medicaid to private insurers. First, the empirical evidence on Medicaid privatization is mixed: contracting out has not meaningfully reduced public costs or improved quality of care. Second, we propose a framework, which we call “procured competition,” to describe the unique structure of Medicaid managed care as a hybrid of public procurement and regulated competition. Third, we discuss the key policy levers across procurement, competition, and consumer choice in this model. Throughout, we highlight open research questions, arguing that the enormous variation in how states design these programs—combined with limited evidence on what works—represents a promising area for high-impact scholarship.
already_seen.topics: Healthcare Policy and Management; Public Procurement and Policy; Global Health Care Issues

already_seen.title: Regulated Competition in Health Insurance Markets on Two Sides of the Atlantic
already_seen.authors: Lukas Kauer; Thomas G. McGuire; Sonja Schillo; Richard C. van Kleef
already_seen.abstract: Many high-income countries implement their policy of universal health insurance by individual health insurance in combination with regulated competition among insurers. Supported by public intervention, regulated competition can, in principle, address market failures in health insurance and smooth out some inequities in the financial consequences of ill health and in the ability to pay for health insurance. We compare the national systems in Germany, the Netherlands, and Switzerland to the US Marketplaces, all of which use versions of regulated competition. While they show many similarities (for example, open enrollment, community-rated premiums with subsidies, comprehensive benefit package, risk adjustment), we focus on three major differences and their implications for market functioning: (1) mandatory and universal versus voluntary and partial (applying to only one sector of health insurance); (2) greater or lesser profit orientation of insurers; and (3) reliance on markets or regulation to contain costs.

already_seen.title: Anticompetitive Contracts Between Insurers and Providers in Health Care
already_seen.authors: Anna D. Sinaiko
already_seen.abstract: For people with private health insurance in the United States, contracts between insurers and providers are important to fostering health care competition and improving efficiency. However, insurer-provider contract provisions do not always advance competition and consumer welfare. This essay discusses the contracting strategies used by insurers to increase competition, and four anticompetitive contract terms: anti-tiering or anti-steering, all-or-nothing, most favored nation, and gag clauses, that may be used by dominant health systems to protect themselves from competition. I conclude with a discussion of policy responses that can be used to address provider use of anticompetitive clauses and that can reduce the negative impacts of provider market power. Understanding anticompetitive contract provisions and the potential policy responses to limit their impact is critical to health care competition.
already_seen.topics: Healthcare Policy and Management; Healthcare Systems and Reforms; Global Health Care Issues

already_seen.title: The Emerging Role of Competition in Health Care
already_seen.authors: Paul Β. Ginsburg
already_seen.abstract: This essay, commissioned to serve as an introduction to the JEP symposium on current competition in health care, provides a historical perspective on the role of both competition and regulation in the financing and delivery of health services since the implementation of Medicare and Medicaid in the mid-1960s. At the beginning of this period, few could perceive a role for competition in healthcare given the key role played by physicians in providing and ordering care and concerns that lower prices might signal lower quality. Initial attempts to slow rapidly rising costs involved various regulatory tools, but over time, regulation increasingly incorporated incentives for providers, to control costs. Competitive approaches began to develop in the late 1970s, in part reflecting broad changes in the nation’s political culture. Competitive approaches are now are quite widespread, but regulation plays an important role in the structuring of competition and in addressing areas where competition is seen as having less potential.

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: This essay, commissioned to serve as an introduction to the JEP symposium on current competition in health care, provides a historical perspective on the role of both competition and regulation in the financing and delivery of health services since the implementation of Medicare and Medicaid in the mid-1960s.

already_seen.title: Physician Competition: Entry and Substitution
already_seen.authors: Joshua D. Gottlieb; Sean Nicholson
already_seen.abstract: We describe competition in the physician market, focusing on how entry barriers and substitution possibilities have changed in recent decades. Regulatory caps on medical school seats and residency slots—especially for high-paying specialties—continue to ration entry, generate high returns for those who gain these slots, and direct the most academically accomplished trainees toward lucrative fields. But trained physicians increasingly compete with nurse practitioners, physician assistants, and other mid-level practitioners in the market for patients. Training of these substitutes has expanded far more rapidly than physician supply. We present key facts about the physician pipeline, a conceptual framework linking specialty earnings to entry barriers, and describe the rise of mid-level providers. These facts mean that effective competition policy in physician markets must look beyond conventional concentration measures and focus on the institutions and laws that govern who can provide medical care.
already_seen.topics: Diversity and Career in Medicine; Global Health Workforce Issues; Medical Education and Admissions

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: We describe competition in the physician market, focusing on how entry barriers and substitution possibilities have changed in recent decades.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 我们描述了医生市场的竞争状况，重点关注近几十年来进入壁垒和替代可能性的变化。医学院席位和住院医师名额的监管上限——尤其是针对高薪专业——持续限制着进入，为获得这些名额的人带来高回报，并将学业成就最高的受训者引向利润丰厚的领域。但受过培训的医生在患者市场中日益与执业护士、医生助理及其他中级执业者竞争。这些替代者的培训增长速度远快于医生供给。我们呈现了关于医生培养管道的关键事实、一个将专业收入与进入壁垒联系起来的概念框架，并描述了中级医疗服务提供者的兴起。这些事实意味着，有效的医生市场竞争政策必须超越传统的市场集中度衡量指标，聚焦于决定谁能够提供医疗服务的制度和法律。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 美国医生市场数据（未明确具体来源与样本范围）
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 医生市场的进入壁垒（尤其是高薪专业）持续存在，而中级执业者的快速增长正在改变竞争格局。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP - 本文聚焦于美国医生市场的竞争与进入壁垒，与给定的城市经济学核心话题（保障房、劳动力流动、财政竞争等）及代理话题均无关联。

already_seen.title: Front Matter
The Economics of Paid Sick Leave
already_seen.authors: Stefan Pichler; Christopher Prinz; Stefan Thewissen; Nicolas R. Ziebarth
already_seen.abstract: This article examines the economics of paid sick leave from both theoretical and empirical perspectives. Research on paid sick leave has evolved dynamically over the last decade, primarily driven by the spread of US sick pay mandates, which have increased paid sick leave access from 63 percent to 77 percent in all US jobs. We begin by discussing the economic rationales for government regulation of paid sick leave, particularly the negative externalities associated with contagious diseases when individuals work while sick. After that, we discuss the key trade-offs in the general design of paid sick leave schemes, along with the trade-offs when setting specific policy parameters. Finally, we review economic modeling approaches to study optimal paid sick leave policies.
already_seen.topics: Workplace Health and Well-being; Employment and Welfare Studies; Economic Policies and Impacts

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: This article examines the economics of paid sick leave from both theoretical and empirical perspectives.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: 本文从理论和实证两个角度审视了带薪病假的经济学。过去十年间，关于带薪病假的研究动态发展，主要驱动力是美国带薪病假强制令的普及，该政策使美国所有工作中带薪病假的覆盖率从63%提升至77%。我们首先讨论了政府对带薪病假进行监管的经济学理由，特别是当个体带病工作时，与传染病相关的负外部性。随后，我们探讨了带薪病假方案总体设计中的关键权衡，以及设定具体政策参数时的权衡。最后，我们回顾了用于研究最优带薪病假政策的经济建模方法。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_DATA: 美国带薪病假强制令实施后的全国就业数据（覆盖率从63%升至77%）
_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: 带薪病假强制令显著提高了美国工作的带薪病假覆盖率，其政策设计需在传染病负外部性控制与成本之间权衡。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIP 本文主题为劳动健康政策，与核心话题（保障房/住房补贴/技能错配/空间错配/人力资本外部性/劳动力流动/城市间迁移/财政竞争/税收竞争/地方政府竞争/公共品供给）及代理话题均无直接或间接关联。

already_seen.title: A Users’ Guide to Uncovering Worker and Firm Effects: The ABC of AKM
already_seen.authors: Stéphane Bonhomme; Thibaut Lamadon; Elena Manresa
already_seen.abstract: The AKM model introduced by Abowd, Kramarz, and Margolis (1999) has become a workhorse to study worker and firm heterogeneity, and to understand the sources of wage dispersion in the labor market using linked employer-employee data. In this article, we introduce the model and estimator, discuss some best practices for estimation, and review some empirical findings on the role of worker and firm heterogeneity in wage dispersion. While the AKM methodology has proven useful to analyze a host of questions in a variety of settings within labor economics and beyond, we also point to the need for methodological developments.
already_seen.topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality; Firm Innovation and Growth; Global trade and economics

_judgment.ONE_SENTENCE: The AKM model introduced by Abowd, Kramarz, and Margolis (1999) has become a workhorse to study worker and firm heterogeneity, and to understand the sources of wage dispersion in the labor market using linked employer-employee data.
_judgment.FULL_TRANSLATION: Abowd、Kramarz和Margolis（1999）提出的AKM模型已成为利用关联雇主-雇员数据研究工人与企业异质性、理解劳动力市场工资差异来源的重要工具。本文介绍了该模型与估计方法，讨论了若干最佳实践，并回顾了关于工人与企业异质性在工资差异中作用的实证发现。尽管AKM方法已被证明有助于分析劳动经济学及其他领域中的多种问题，我们仍指出其方法论发展的必要性。

_judgment.JUDGMENT_FINDING: AKM模型是研究工人与企业异质性及工资差异的核心工具，但需进一步发展方法论。
_judgment.JUDGMENT_WORTH: SKIM（本文为方法综述，对AKM模型应用者具有参考价值，但非核心话题直接相关）
